description_en: The SoundCloud headquarters are located on the former site of the Berlin Wall. So, to mark the 25th anniversary of its fall, SoundCloud launched the Berlin Wall of Sound, an audiovisual reconstruction of the Berlin Wall. The memorial acted as SoundCloud's global landing page for a week. The track's waveform mirrors the exact shape of the Wall, and its 7:32 duration represents the exact time needed for sound to travel the Wall's original 155 kilometre length. description_zh: 一代又一代的美國家庭伴隨著 Honey Maid 長大，但這個品牌變得過時且無關緊要。Droga5 發起了一項活動，旨在認識美國家庭不斷變化的面貌，重點關注同性、跨種族和單親家庭

description_en: For the 25th anniversary of Photoshop, Goodby Silverstein & Partners San Francisco crafted an anthem for dreamers - a video made entirely from Photoshop files and their layers. The animation was based solely on artwork curated from Behance, Adobe's creative community of four million people. Files were contributed by over 100 artists, and were deconstructed, animated, sequenced and synced to Aerosmith's iconic Dream On. The process used over 3,500 layers and took three weeks. description_zh: 為慶祝 Photoshop 誕生 25 週年，舊金山的 Goodby Silverstein & Partners 為夢想家創作了一首讚歌 - 一段完全由 Photoshop 文件及其圖層製作的影片。該動畫完全基於 Adob​​e 旗下 Behance 策劃的藝術作品

description_en:
Even the most open-minded people have internalized the implicit bias of cultural stereotypes, whether or not they act on it consciously. To help expose this bias, we created an online video featuring a variety of couples interacting behind a large X-ray installation. As the skeletons kissed and danced, viewers mentally filled in the blanks. When unexpected pairs stepped out from behind the screen, the surprise gave viewers a simple demonstration of their implicit bias.

description_en: This Girl Can was created in 2015 to help women smash through barriers preventing them from getting active, by sticking two fingers up at judgment. But this alone was not enough. The campaign had to confront how society must change for all women to get moving, while also tackling practical barriers such as money and time. description_zh: 這個 Girl Can 於 2015 年創建，旨在透過伸出兩根手指進行判斷來幫助女性衝破阻礙她們活躍的障礙。但僅此還不夠。這場運動必須面對社會必須如何改變才能讓所有女性成為女性

description_en: To launch Mix Brazil, the largest cultural celebration of diversity in Latin America, Neogama/BBH created a campaign to underline a ubiquitous and insidious prejudice in Brazilian society. Certain behaviours, no matter how trivial, can be interpreted as gay. If you're a guy that trains glutes or a girl with body hair, you could be called gay. This spot uses humour to highlight the issue with an epic song based on Carl Orff's O Fortuna.

description_zh: 美國每年有 3 萬名受害者死於槍枝暴力。人們對這個問題已經麻木了。你如何克服他們的冷漠並迫使他們參與？你把受害者帶回來講述他們的故事。隆重介紹 Unforgotten，一款戶外產品

description_zh: 《星期日泰晤士報》富豪榜是一個全國性機構，已經運作了 25 年多。許多不常閱讀《星期日泰晤士報》的人購買該版本只是為了獲得具有收藏價值的富豪榜。為了宣傳 2014 年版，格雷

description_en: While many people are aware that FGM happens in Africa, few realise that the practice is also prevalent in Europe. The campaign provoked a visceral reaction in viewers. Seeing something as emotional as a flag treated with such brutality provoked people to feel empathy with the hundreds of thousands of girls who are at risk of being treated this way. The campaign made European audiences realise that FGM isn’t something that only happens in far off places, and provoked them to support 28 Too Many

description_en: In 2014 Brazil was the world Champion in football related violence: 19 deaths and over 100 injured. In order to stop the violence, authorities have tried everything. But hooligans don’t listen to anyone. Or do they? We invited the mothers of 33 hooligans to help doing the security during the most violent game of the season – Sport Recife vs. Náutico. After all, no one wants to get in a fight in front of a mother, especially your own.

description_en: We wanted to show people they have the power to stop domestic violence. So we created an interactive digital experience, displaying an image of a beaten women. If people ignored her, she remained the same. But if people noticed her, her bruises would fade. Facial-recognition cameras made this transition seamless. The campaign rose to global prominence, reaching 326.9 million people.

campaign_name: Great Chinese Names For Great Britain
description_en:
Visit Britain, the national tourism agency, hoped to attract more Chinese visitors to the UK. The Chinese, however, preferred visiting the US and Europe, both of which outspend Britain and offer more attractions per entry visa. Our insight was that Chinese names were important to this group and helped shape perception. British landmarks either didn’t have Chinese names at all or had meaningless phonetic translations for names.

So our idea was to invite the Chinese to coin their own names for Br
description_zh: 英國國家旅遊局英國旅遊局希望吸引更多中國遊客到英國旅遊。然而，中國人更喜歡訪問美國和歐洲，這兩個國家的消費都超過英國，而且每次入境簽證都能提供更多景點。我們的見解是 C

description_en:
It’s not great to have insects in your home. Especially if they’re breeding and multiplying which chances are, they most certainly are. 
Yes, they’re having crazy, sexy times on every possible surface of your home. Make them stop with fast, deadly Doom insecticide.
description_zh:
家里有昆虫可不是什么好事。尤其是當它們正在繁殖和繁殖時（很有可能），它們肯定會繁殖。
是的，他們在你家的每一個可能的表面上度過了瘋狂、性感的時光。用快速、致命的 Do 让他们停下来

description_en: Energy drinks are often aimed at getting people to do more, and more, and more. They seem to miss that there are normal everyday events that require energy to get through, or excel in. Lucozade is there to help you overcome those tricky and tiring moments, those “give-me-strength” moments. We created a radio campaign to symbolize the energizing effect of Lucozade in day-to-day scenarios.
description_zh: 能量飲料通常旨在讓人們做更多、更多、更多的事情。他們似乎忽略了一些正常的日常活動需要精力來完成或擅長。 Lucozade 可以幫助您克服那些棘手和疲憊的事情

description_en: The Australian Bureau of Statistics wanted to show disinterested Australians just how important census data can be. Taking census data from every postcode in the country, we turned the campaign into a game, letting players control a version of their town modelled on its real-life demographics. While census data might not be of high interest for the average Australian, our statistics game has been played by more than 70,000 people, offering each of them a unique perspective on what the data actua
description_zh: 澳洲統計局希望向公正的澳洲人展示人口普查數據的重要性。我們從全國每個郵政編碼區獲取人口普查數據，將活動變成了遊戲，讓玩家控制他們的某個版本

description_en: In April 2013, Australian rock diva Chrissy Amphlett died from breast cancer. Best known as the charismatic vocalist of Divinyls, Chrissy's biggest hit was the 1990 single I Touch Myself, a paean to female sexuality loved by millions around the globe. On the first anniversary of Chrissy's death, JWT Sydney teamed with Cancer Council New South Wales to launch the I Touch Myself Project. Ten of Australia's leading female artists, from rock goddesses to indie pop sensations, soul singers to soprano
description_zh: 2013 年 4 月，澳洲搖滾天后 Chrissy Amphlett 因乳癌去世。Chrissy 最出名的是 Divinyls 樂團的魅力歌手，她最熱門的作品是 1990 年的單曲《I Touch Myself》，這是一首對女性性慾的讚歌，受到全球數百萬人的喜愛

description_en: In an attempt to change the way society views disabilities, Leo Burnett Paris invited children and parents to play an educational game. Separated by a partition, children and parents were asked to imitate faces projected on a giant screen. Everyone participated with enthusiasm until a girl with multiple disabilities appeared. description_zh: 為了改變社會對殘疾人士的看法，李奧貝納巴黎邀請兒童和家長玩教育遊戲。孩子和家長被隔間隔開，被要求模仿大螢幕上投射的臉。大家p

description_en:
Recent research has proven that constant mental stimulation can delay the loss of memory when Alzheimer is in its early stage.
To preserve their memory, they need solutions that helps them to be continuously connected to their memories.

In real time, the Backup Memory provides patients  with reminders of the identity of the person entering their field of intimacy, via instant notifications. Patients can thus view their relationship status with that person.
The app  exposes regularly the pat
description_zh:

為了保存他們的記憶，他們需要幫助他們持續連結記憶的解決方案。

description_en: Many children have an undetected vision problem. Saatchi & Saatchi Sydney and eye care provider OPSM created Penny the Pirate, a storybook and certified medical device, which enables parents to screen their child's vision as they read them a bedtime story. The story follows the journey of a young girl as she tries to become captain of the Mighty Pickle. A series of simple screening exercises are woven into the adventure and, by entering children's results online, parents can determine if there's
description_zh: 許多孩子都有未被發現的視力問題。Saatchi & Saatchi Sydney 和眼科護理提供者 OPSM 共同創作了《海盜佩妮》，這是一本故事書和經過認證的醫療設備，讓父母可以在睡前閱讀孩子的視力時進行視力篩檢

description_en:
Iodine deficiency is a problem that plagues most of rural India. Women suffer the most and are often the victims of Breast Cancer, Fibrocystic Breast Disease and complications during pregnancy. And even though supplements in the form of pills are available, women weren’t in the habit of consuming them.
 
Almost every Indian woman wears a bindi, a traditional symbol of beauty. Life Saving Dot, an idea that transformed bindis into iodine patches. These were a preventive measure disguised like a tr
description_zh: 缺乏碘是困擾印度大部分農村地區的問題。女性受害最嚴重，往往是乳癌、纖維囊性乳房疾病和懷孕期間併發症的受害者。儘管藥片形式的補充劑很流行

description_en: EDF is the world's largest electricity producer. To most French people, that means little but bills and big industry. So, to remind 26 million customers that EDF also develops services to help them in their everyday lives, and to build new relationships, Havas Worldwide Paris didn't just produce a TV spot. They created a TV series. In the first ever advertising spin-off of an existing TV series, the ads play off the success of comedy series Platane (Plane), starring popular French comedian Eric

The Skip Ad festival gave musicians just five seconds to impress viewers. If viewers skipped the ad, the singer was rejected. If not, the singer was approved. description_zh: 為了宣傳 2014 年美國真人秀歌唱比賽 The Voice，Publicis Brazil 創建了第一個在 YouTube 前置廣告中舉辦的音樂節。Skip Ad 音樂節只給了音樂家五秒鐘的時間來給觀眾留下深刻印象。我

John Barnes experiments with a flock of chickens and five ex-England lookalikes to find out what it will take to win this summer.

description_en: Each year, the world throws away hundreds of millions of tons of fruits and vegetables, mainly because of their appearance. With the EU imposing strict actions against food waste in 2014, Intermarché and Marcel Worldwide joined forces to alter consumers' perceptions of imperfect fruits and vegetables. The supermarket bought from its growers the products they usually throw away, and sold them with a 30% discount. Celebrating the beauty of the Ridiculous Potato, the Hideous Orange and the Failed L

BBDO New York created a whole new type of mobile banner ad, fuelled not by media spend but by an everyday online action: sharing links. Across two months, over two millions fans visited the Unity website and created over 200,000 custom assassins, picking from over five million possible options. description_zh: 目標是創建一系列新的電影標識，為 Film4 的電視內容提供框架。每個核心身分必須夠靈活，能夠包含多種播放內容，但又夠模糊，不能只屬於電影類型。由此產生的

People could buy the cards in stores across the UK or create and share their own online. An accompanying campaign film showed exactly how to
description_zh: 聖誕節是一個給予的時刻，更重要的是，一個索取的時刻。但讓我們面對現實吧，我們並不總是能得到我們想要的。因此，為了確保每個人都能在 2014 年聖誕節得到他們想要的東西，adam&eveDDB 創作了一系列半開玩笑的內容

description_en: Land Rover became famous because of its adventurous spirit. But over the past years, its top edge design and product quality made people see it as a luxurious item, more focused on luxury than anything else. Y&R New York had a tough mission to rescue that spirit and reconnect man with nature once again. This campaign shows how man and nature are more connected than they think. Go out there, find and even deeper connection.

description_en:
Melanoma is the most lethal cancer for those aged between 15 and 30.

We created an online persona for Melanoma who ‘liked’, ‘followed’, and commented on young Australians’ social media activities, in real time. An application linked to Twitter and Instagram searched for posts from a library of popular hashtags and geolocations. The application aggregated these posts and notified our social media team in real-time so they could respond with creepy messages from Melanoma.

Unique Visits to the “S

黑色素瘤是 15 歲至 30 歲族群中最致命的癌症。

我們為黑色素瘤創建了一個線上角色，他即時「喜歡」、「關注」並評論澳洲年輕人的社群媒體活動。一個連結到 Twitter 和我的應用程式

description_en:
TWC2 wanted to call attention to the plight of foreign domestic workers who toil endlessly with no breaks in Singapore. The target audience was parents who employ these domestic workers.
So we showed how parents lose out on their relationship with their children by always requiring their domestic worker to be around. The day off was re-positioned as an opportunity to enhance family bonding, giving employers a direct personal incentive to change their behaviour. The film proved that 74% of domest
description_zh:
TWC2 希望引起人們對新加坡外籍家庭傭工的困境的關注，他們無休無止地辛苦勞作，沒有休息時間。目標受眾是僱用這些家庭傭工的父母。
所以我們展示了父母如何失去與孩子的關係

campaign_name: Travel Before It’S Not Fun Anymore
description_en: Travel is such fun when you’re a young student. There are so many possibilities and things to get up to. But as you get older and have kids many of these things are no longer possible. Essentially, the fun is stripped away and you’re left with the harsh realities of being a parent. So book a Student Flight, travel before you have kids and before it’s not fun any more.
description_zh: 當你還是一名年輕的學生時，旅行是如此有趣。有太多的可能性和需要去做的事情。但隨著年齡的增長和有了孩子，很多事情都不再可能了。從本質上講，樂趣被剝奪了，你只剩下哈

description_en: LOLA Madrid along with Kiss FM Xmas Dlights have created "the first Christmas lights that nobody will want to unplug, because instead of boring carols, these lights reproduce the biggest hits of the year in a Christmas tree version. Using artists like Pharrell, Pitbull, Calvin Harris, Bruno Mars, Daft Punk, Miley Cyrus, Lorde and all the hits of 2014. How do they work? Very easy. Place the lights on the tree, connect them to your WiFi and automatically connect to the Kiss FM playlist.

brand: The National University Centre For Organ Transplantation
description_en: There are over 500 patients in Singapore waiting for organ transplantations and yet over 10,000 Singaporeans opt out of organ donation every year. This collaboration between NUCOT and Lowe Singapore is put together with old recordings of deceased voice artists, asking people to support organ donation. It was broadcast on the radio as well as online at the very point where the opt-out form is downloaded.

description_en: People love using social media to tell the world where they are. But in the wrong hands, this information could be dangerous. 78% of burglars now use social media to find their targets. Allstate wanted to raise awareness of this modern insurance vulnerability. So, Leo Burnett Chicago made an example of one real oversharing couple during a highly-anticipated game of American college football. Shortly after kickoff, a social media-savvy burglar appeared in their home and started selling everything
description_zh: 人們喜歡使用社群媒體告訴世界他們在哪裡。但如果落入壞人之手，這些資訊可能會很危險。78% 的竊賊現在使用社群媒體來尋找目標。好事達希望提高人們對這現代保險漏洞的認識

description_en: Skittles have a reputation for off-kilter ads. For the brand's first ever Super Bowl spot, they needed something special. The piece sees two friends arguing over their last remaining lemon Skittle. They decide to settle their dispute in the 'usual way', by arm wrestling. The bell tolls in the dusty town and its people flock to the streets to see the quarrel resolved, each bringing with them an enormous right arm. Generations of similar squabbles have seen uncountable arm wrestling matches take p

description_en: To demonstrate the universal power of entertainment for Comcast, Goodby Silverstein & Partners New York asked Emily, a seven-year-old who is blind, to tell the world what she sees when she watches the Wizard of Oz. Each step of the process was documented, culminating in the shoot day, on which Emily, her family and the crew got to see, feel and experience Emily's vision. That vision then became a touching 60-second TV spot. GS&P conducted an exhaustive national casting process, contacting school

description_en: Holidays are wasted in our tireless search for a secure Wi-Fi connection. On behalf of Deutsche Telekom, who offer data roaming at a fixed price, Tribal DDB Berlin wanted to encourage people to look for the fun, not for the Wi-Fi. This mockumentary-style spot tells the story of José, a loveable rascal and naive entrepreneur who trains dogs to sniff out Wi-Fi and leases them to holidaygoers. The amusing film pokes fun at the lengths we'll go to to find internet abroad.
description_zh: 我们不知疲倦地寻找安全的 Wi-Fi 连接，浪费了假期。Tribal DDB Berlin 代表以固定价格提供数据漫游的德国电信，希望鼓励人们寻找乐趣，而不是为了 Wi-Fi。這部紀錄片

description_en: In Umeå, Sweden, local internet service provider ume.net offers one of the world's fastest connections. To increase awareness, ANR BBDO devised and executed an experiment that spotlighted one of the internet's biggest disturbances: lag. They equipped four volunteers with a custom-built lag machine programmed to adjust video resolution and simulate real-time buffering. description_zh: 在瑞典於默奧，當地網路服務供應商 ume.net 提供世界上最快的連線之一。為了提高意識，ANR BBDO 設計並執行了一項實驗，重點是網路最大的干擾之一：延遲。他們配備了

description_en: Radiant was an almost a delisted product. Tasked with proving that Radiant keeps clothes looking newer, DDB Melbourne developed the ultimate test. They bought clothes and subjected them to absurd stress tests including paintballing, quad biking and clay modelling. The clothes were then washed with Radiant and returned the very next day. Across a packed weekend, lucky revellers were treated to concerts, games
description_zh: 百威淡啤酒 (Bud Light) 於 2015 年初推出了 Up for What 活動，當時他們為一位毫無戒心的人帶來了一生中的美好時光。Energy BBDO 知道 Bud Light 需要跟進，讓每個人都有機會體驗只有像 Bud 這樣的品牌才能帶來的意想不到的樂趣

description_en: Seven years after the troubled PS3 launch, PlayStation was facing the most important console launch in the most critical year of the brand’s history. We needed to fly in the face of the industry trend toward entertainment over gaming by launching a single-minded idea that would speak to the brand’s legacy - and directly to gamers’ hearts. In 7 months, “Greatness Awaits” was integrated across all PlayStation channels. According to IGN, PS 4 had the 'Largest Console Launch in History'.  PlayStatio

description_en: Fencing is one of the oldest and most well-known sports in the world. However, very few know its rules. To remedy that, Dentsu designed a visual language and manifestation system that offers audiences an intuitive understanding. Using motion capture and AR technology, the trajectory of the tip of the blade is made visible to spectators. Various techniques executed by competitors are instantly converted into recognisable icons which are displayed on screen, letting the audience know exactly what'
description_zh: 擊劍是世界上最古老、最著名的運動之一。然而，很少人知道它的規則。為了解決這個問題，電通設計了一種視覺語言和表現系統，為觀眾提供直覺的理解。使用動作捕捉

description_en: With the tea market saturated, new products need to stand out. Landor distanced new tea brand Wait from well-worn advertising stories of origins and traditions and, instead, focussed on a commonly shared insight: people just don't have enough time these days. Wait celebrates patience as the ultimate luxury, inviting people to enjoy the specific wait times of each tea with spectacular and evolving illustrations.
description_zh: 隨著茶葉市場的飽和，新產品需要脫穎而出。朗濤遠離了新茶品牌等待的起源和傳統的陳舊廣告故事，而是專注於一個共同的見解：人們只是沒有足夠的時間來喝茶。

description_zh:

description_en: To be a talented creative, you need a strong will. Creatives work constantly and their faith is strengthened as they dream up new ideas. description_en:
The Depaul Nightstop project helps young, homeless people get off the streets and into the spare rooms of volunteers. But fears about personal safety prevent many people from getting involved.

To change opinions, we created posters that sit either side of a street corner. The left side sums up people’s preconceptions about taking in a homeless youth. When both sides are read together the perspective changes to show the positive side of volunteering.

description_en: Thalys wanted a fresh way to present their train destinations. Something different from the usual photos of famous tourist spots. We captured the sound identities of Paris, Brussels and Amsterdam and integrated them into three outdoor installations. Each city was represented by over 1000 sounds, and each sound had a unique headphone jack. description_zh: Thalys 希望以一種新的方式來展示他們的火車目的地。與通常的著名旅遊景點的照片有所不同。我們捕捉了巴黎、布魯塞爾和阿姆斯特丹的聲音特徵，並將它們整合到三個戶外裝置中。

description_en:
Our objective was mainly to change people’s mind that say; “Samsung is a quality brand but it’s away from society. Samsung just sells products”.  We want them to say, “Samsung cares about all people and create solutions.”
We wanted people to build empathy for the deaf people and show the true difference that removing an obstacle from a their life makes. By doing that, we wanted to lead by example and ignite a change in the attitudes and behaviors towards the disabled people.
description_zh:
我們的目標主要是改變人們的想法： “三星是一個優質品牌，但它遠離社會。三星只是賣產品”。我們希望他們說：“三星關心所有人並創造解決方案。”
我們希望人們能夠建造它們

description_en:
Guatemala’s Volunteer Firefighters, “Bomberos Voluntarios de Guatemala”, constantly face resource shortages due to their lack of a stable income through donations. This significantly affects their ability to respond to emergencies.

Two radio commercials simulated recorded emergency calls with a simple twist: the firefighter was the one asking for help, proving how people ́s donations are as urgent and important as a firefighter rescue work.

Beer consumption in New Zealand is at its lowest since World War 2. So to promote DB Export we gave Kiwi men a brilliant reason to drink more beer
Brewtroleum is a biofuel made from leftover brewing yeast. It cut carbon emissions by 8%, meaning every time a man drank DB Export he was helping to save the world. Suddenly every sip made a difference, and every party was for the planet

description_zh: 讓女性定期檢查乳房以預防乳癌是非常困難的。然而，他們平均每天查看手機 110 次。因此，我們決定以一種能夠讓我們在訊息上可見的格式來傳播我們的訊息。

description_en:
This film is a last goodbye for an Olympic great—a personal story used to tell a bigger brand message.
 
The film lets us see exactly what Michael Phelps has built his legacy on: a lifetime of going dark and becoming invisible, both literally and metaphorically—a lifetime of training in the relentless pursuit of sporting greatness.

The film works towards the brand message “It’s what you do in the dark that puts you in the light.”
description_zh:
這部電影是對一位奧運偉人的最後告別——一個用來講述更大品牌訊息的個人故事。

這部電影讓我們準確地看到邁克爾菲爾普斯 (Michael Phelps) 的遺產是建立在什麼基礎上的：一生都在黑暗中變得隱形，無論是字面上還是在現實中。

campaign_name: The First Ever Pinterest Yard Sale
description_en:
All spray paint brands talked about the same thing: protection. So when Krylon needed to stand out from the crowd, we found something a little more interesting to say: spray paint makes old, worthless objects valuable again.
We travelled 690 miles up the World’s Longest Yard Sale, buying 127 worthless items and transforming them with Krylon, then sold them all for a profit in the First Ever Pinterest Yard Sale.
We were the first brand to use Pinterest’s new Buyable Pin functionality, with 69 mil
description_zh:

Hidden cameras inside the passengers’ helmets went live and they were taken
description_zh:

description_en: Every year in India, more than 1000 women are attacked by men using acid that is easily available. Beauty Vlogs by Reshma, an acid attack survivor, sourced signatures on a petition addressed to the Prime Minister of India. This was to end over-the-counter sale of acid. Her plea took the world by storm. What needed 25,000 signatures received over 3,00,000 signatures, strengthening the movement beyond all expectations.

description_en:
For Bond film Spectre, Director Sam Mendes wanted Aston Martin to design a completely new car. It had to be beautiful, contemporary and timeless, but in an unexpected way. Like Bond, it should possess a classy, quintessentially British demeanour and brutal power.

The DB10 was designed with the poise a shark-like hunter. Instinctive, agile, powerful. Its elegance characterised by a low nose and grille, and simple yet hard lines that slink back to protruding rear shoulders.

Since Spectre, the DB

We were approached by the NGO to create awareness around the existence of child marriage in Lebanon today and give the NGO proper pressuring tools to use against the relevant authorities and make a change.
Research showed that amongst those laws, a girl as young as 9 can marry. We realized that not all people were aware that this law existed or was still applicable.
Our objective was to raise awareness on the issue and rally public support around the cause.

description_en:
If a witness speaks up when they see bullying, 60 percent of the time that bullying stops within 10 seconds. So we created a tool to stop bullying: an emoji. 

The emoji, which is now on every iPhone and Android phone, is a way of combating not just bullying but also any apprehension of stepping in witnesses may be feeling. A symbol can be a universal message of “I don’t stand for this.” And it can be accessed with the touch of a finger.

description_en: Over 65% of Australia receives no mobile phone signal, making the outback one of the most dangerous mobile black-spots in the world. Together these devices create a store-and-forward network of emergency signal that anyone can access using an ordinary mobile phone.

ANZ Bank wanted to get people talking about financial gender inequality to coincide with International Women’s Day. 
To gain a fresh and sharable perspective, a social experiment was captured by a documentary film maker. Brothers and sisters were asked to do chores. We then paid them for the work, but the boys got more than the girls, just like in the real world.

description_en:
Can you name 3 female inventors? It’s not easy and the sad truth is most people can’t. This realization lead us to celebrate surprising female inventions and all things woman-made. And to further encourage girls to Make What’s Next, we launched a Patent Program for women. Currently only 7% of US patents are held by women so we wanted to do something to address this under representation.
 
This campaign gave girls strong STEM female role models by showing them that not everything is “man-made”

description_en: Most Kiwis associate family violence with low socio-economic groups. But in reality, it affects everyone, including 1/4 of high-income homes. But no one knew, and couldn’t help. So we partnered with NZ’s leading home magazine and revealed the truth. We created an article showcasing a new designer home in an upmarket suburb. The article looked and read just like regular content but in the copy and pictures, we placed tell-tale signs that all was not ok. The ad sparked national conversation, reach
description_zh: 大多數紐西蘭人將家庭暴力與社會經濟地位較低的群體聯繫起來。但實際上，它影響到所有人，包括 1/4 的高收入家庭。但沒有人知道，也無能為力。因此，我們與紐西蘭領先的家居雜誌合作並揭露了真相。

description_en:
Five lives are lost on New Zealand roads every week. The families of these people don’t just lose a loved one; they lose a lifetime of potential.
 
In order to get drivers to consider the ongoing cost of one bad decision behind the wheel, we brought this statistic to life in a uniquely emotive way.
 
Using the science of age progression, combined with the artistry of Weta Digital, we created five photorealistic CGI portraits of five road victims, as they would look if they were still alive today

description_en:
Nike RISE 2015 delivered the world’s most advanced basketball coaching tool. A connected ecosystem of LED court, pinpoint accurate tracking and intuitive coaching app.

It allows coaches to automatically assess, monitor and track players on court, building an accurate performance profile of up to 30 players simultaneously.

Coaches can then bespoke create drills based on players’ strengths and weaknesses, demonstrate and annotate plays directly beneath players’ feet and deliver instant on-court

The brief was to create a brand and a packaging design disrupting the beer category and reestablishing the status of lagers. 

Noam is a manifestation of how a light beer can be one of the finer things in life. Designed to be the lager for non-lager occasions where champagne or Chablis is the norm.  

Noam currently sells at premium outlets Soho House Berlin, Colette in Paris and selected restaurants in major cities in Europe. It has earned recognition in international design and lifestyle media

description_en:
Brief: Since opening in 1954 Burger King has cooked their burgers one way and one way only; by flame-grilling them. They needed a simple way to show this.
 
Solution: Over the years several Burger King restaurants have burned to the ground. Since Burger King proudly flame-grills all of their Burger’s, we ran images of these fires under the tag-line “Flame-grilled since 1954.”
 
Location & Distribution: Ran as full page newspaper spreads in El Puntal de Villa María - in Córdoba, Argentina.

description_en: In August 2015, BK published an open letter proposing a ‘burger wars’ ceasefire with longstanding rival McDonald’s. We set out to find an innovative way to effect real change online – tackling online bullying behaviour before it happens.

description_en:
“What our girls are made of” is one of the most recognizable and loved songs from Russian childhood.  Still sung by children and parents from an early age, the song’s verses sweetly describe little girls as made of “flowers”, “gossip” and “marmalade”.

To challenge these subtle, but outdated notions of gender roles, the film rewrites the lyrics and highlights some of Russian’s strongest athletes, in the hope of creating a new dialogue around what’s possible.
description_zh: 「我們的女孩是由什麼組成的」是俄羅斯童年時期最知名、最受喜愛的歌曲之一。這首歌的歌詞從很小的時候起就一直被孩子和父母所唱，它的歌詞甜蜜地描述了小女孩是由“鮮花”、“八卦”和“果醬”組成的。

description_en: "Evan" is a film created to bring awareness to the fact that signs of gun violence exist, and to encourage people to learn them. Through this approach, viewers were able to experience how easy it is to miss signs, instead of us just telling them.

description_en: Bedtime is the time of day when parents and children spend quality time together. So DIY brand Castorama turned this precious moment into a magical one. The Magic Wallpaper is the first wallpaper that gives access to countless adventures with its fun and innovative way of telling stories to children.

description_en: Made in a Minute is a 360 degree, how-to video series that allows people to learn at their own pace. We broke projects down into 8 steps which loop continuously like a GIF. We shot them separately, then stitched them together in 360, so the same person can be seen demonstrating the entire build. By following the actions and reading the in-set instructions, users can make a designer side table or teepee all by tilting their phone or swiping the screen.
description_zh: Made in a Minute 是一個 360 度的操作影片系列，讓人們可以按照自己的步調學習。我們將專案分為 8 個步驟，這些步驟像 GIF 一樣不斷循環。我們分別拍攝它們，然後以 360 度的角度將它們拼接在一起，所以相同的人

description_en:
Serena Williams is the world's greatest female athlete. Gatorade looked to celebrate her career, but 
were aware of the target teen audience's notoriously short attention spans. So it created a 22-level video game embedded within a Snapchat advert. It takes users through William's entire career and challenges them to win each of her 22 Grand Slams - faithfully recreated down to her outfits and hairstyles of the time.
description_zh:

我們意識到目標青少年受眾的注意力持續時間非常短。因此，它創建了一個嵌入 Snapchat 廣告的 22 級視頻遊戲。

McDonald's 'Snaplications'

McDonald’s has launched Snaplications which gives Australians the chance to apply for a job with the fast-food chain through a Snapchat lens.

Created by VML Sydney, Snapchat users can now select a lens which sees them in a McDonald’s uniform. From there, they are able to send a 10-second video submission to the McDonald’s Snapchat account, @Maccas.

description_en:
Samsung partnered with Surf Life Saving Australia to develop Pocket Patrol - a first of its kind app that displays exact positions of live beach dangers.
Lifesavers use Pocket Patrol’s unique AR algorithm to input real time data of rip currents, stingers, shallow sandbanks, sudden drop offs and submerged rocks.
This is then instantly communicated to every person on the beach saving lifesavers’ valuable time and enabling them to stay focused on monitoring the beach.
Pocket Patrol empowers beac

救生員使用 Pocket Patrol 獨特的 AR 演算法輸入離岸電流、sti 的即時數據

description_en: For the 2017 French presidential election, Libération embarked on an anti-fake news campaign. Championing fact-checked journalism, the aim was to help voters sort fact from fiction. CheckNews – a new kind of search engine – was created powered not by algorithms but by journalists. People could ask questions on checknews.fr and journalists investigated their queries before returning with real, fact-based, and verifiable answers.

description_en:
Brief: 
Bingeing shows, following famous families, and liking coworkers’ vacation photos has not just caused us to live vicariously through others—it’s made us addicted to our screens. For Nike, that’s a problem. It’s the antithesis of Just Do It. As a result, the brand set out to shake things up by disrupting this unproductive behavior and the audiences who get caught up in it, encouraging them instead to get outside and get moving.
 
Audience: 
People wasting time with unproductive behavior.

description_en:
Brief: 
Deutsche Telekom’s fundamental belief is that “Life is for sharing.” To us, memories and the people we share them with are what really matter in life. 
Dementia is the single biggest threat to this belief and what we need is enough data to figure out how to stop it. To close the knowledge gap we talked to casual gamers and emotional philanthropists to volunteer their time to game for good, to play Sea Hero Quest – the only game that help scientists fight dementia.

 
Solution & Cult

癡呆症是對這項信念的最大威脅，我們需要足夠的數據來

description_en:
People with Dyslexia can struggle to read even the simplest of words. Sydlexia wanted to generate awareness about this little-known disorder.  Dyslexics think differently - they find it easier to grasp words when taught using methods driven by visual, tactile and spatial stimulation.
We created a series of posters that illustrate how difficult it can be to make sense of a word you can’t recognize. The designs double up as interactive learning tools in the form of origami posters. Once folded co
description_zh: 患有閱讀障礙的人甚至很難閱讀最簡單的單字。Sydlexia 希望提高人們對這種鮮為人知的疾病的認識。誦讀困難症患者的思維方式不同——他們發現使用視覺驅動的方法進行教學時更容易掌握單字

description_en:
The forest fires in Indonesia are becoming an annual affair. To clear the land for farming, palm oil companies burn virgin rainforests down. Birdlife wanted Indonesians and the neighbouring countries affected to know that habitat loss had a devastating effect on native bird species. 

This campaign is part of BirdLife's 'Forests of Hope' programme (Hutan Harapan). Harapan is Indonesia's first Ecosystem Restoration Concession and covers over 98,000 ha of threatened lowland forest in Sumatra.
description_zh: 印尼的森林火災已成為一年一度的事件。為了清理土地用於耕種，棕櫚油公司燒毀了原始雨林。鳥類保護組織希望印尼人和受影響的鄰國知道棲息地的喪失造成了毀滅性的打擊

description_en: The Dentsu Advertising Awards is the most prestigious advertising award in Japan. We worked on the total design for the Dentsu Advertising Awards 2016 Exhibition. Great advertisement only comes from acute observations of human being: its behavior and the deep understanding of psychology. This universal value never changes with the times, however the modes of advertising become more varied and ambitious.

description_en:
285 Mio. people worldwide are blind and/or visually impaired (B&VI). For the last 20 years, there were no innovations in communications technology for them: 
Existing digital Braille devices are bulky and expensive. They weigh around 2kg and cost $3,000 to $15,000. This makes them unaffordable to the majority of B&VI people: only 5% own such a device.
Our objective was to develop a practical and affordable solution.
description_zh:

現有的數位點字設備體積龐大且昂貴。它們重約 2 公斤，售價 3 美元

So we created Premmie Proud. Designed with the Miracle Babies Foundation and the world’s no 1. baby photo sharing app, BabyPics, it’s a new social initiative that encourages parents with premature babies to share their little miracle with the world.

description_en: At the end of 2016, Trump election mania had taken over social media. Our execution imagines the worst possible election outcome, painting a bleak picture of what the US would be like in a specific post election scenario. We never imagined it would actually happen. Given the unpredictability of world events, we
description_zh: 2016年底，川普選舉狂熱席捲了社群媒體。因此，當旅行團 Student Flights 向我們介紹如何戰術性地利用廣播媒體來促進青少年赴美旅遊時，我們想出了一個可共享的社交媒體解決方案

description_en: Awareness of testicular cancer amongst 15-39-year-olds is shockingly low. This mobile-based exercise challenges guys to map – and then run – the shape of a 'cock and balls.' They were then encouraged to share the route via #GoBallsOut, and challenge others to join in. The campaign reached 86% of New Zealand men in the target age group.

campaign_name: The Curious Afterlife Of A Tin
description_en: Altoids tins have become part of pop culture because people don’t throw them away. The uses of an empty tin are endless, and as a result, old Altoids tins seem to arouse our curiosity whenever we see one. Continuing on our campaign of “Curiously Strong Mints,” we created the line “The Curious Afterlife of a Tin,” which focuses on the tin itself, instead of the mints, and asks the world “What’s in the tins of these curious characters?"
description_zh: Altoids 罐頭已經成為流行文化的一部分，因為人們不會扔掉它們。空罐子的用途是無窮無盡的，因此，每當我們看到舊的 Altoids 罐子時，似乎都會引起我們的好奇心。繼續我們的「Curiously Stro」活動

description_en: Tinymos is the world's smallest, smartest and most social astrophotography camera. Designed to be portable and easy to use, it comes equipped with an augmented reality StarMap to guide the user through the skies in real time. The patented noise reduction algorithm also removes atmospheric interference through image processing within the camera. At 1/3rd the price and 1/10th the weight, TinyMOS is making astrophotography truly accessible to all.

description_en: Silicon Valley has two audiences: regular fans, who enjoy the humour and T.J. Miller’s hair, and hardcore fans, who delve deeper into the tech-culture. description_en: Xbox Design Lab sells customised controllers, but at a high price point. So to take cost out of the equation, and increase sales, Xbox asked gamers to claim ownership of their controller designs. The more people buy a design, the more it earns. It changed behaviour, turning gamers into entrepreneurs. Sports teams, flags, current events, causes – all inspired designs. Gamers promoted their designs on social channels, and Xbox amplified them in-store, online and in ATL media leading to a 350% sale
description_zh: Xbox 設計實驗室銷售客製化控制器，但價格很高。因此，為了消除成本並增加銷量，Xbox 要求玩家聲明其控制器設計的所有權。購買設計的人越多，賺的錢就越多。它ch

description_en: In the North Pacific, an area of plastic trash the size of France has formed. Governments have simply ignored it so the Plastic Oceans Foundation and LadBible submitted an application to the UN to recognise The Trash Isles as an official country. If granted, this would compel other nations to clean it up. As a result, 200,000 people became citizens and the campaign reached half a billion people.

description_en: Ever since the Ice Bucket Challenge raised over $115 million dollars for the ALS Association, the ALS community has been eager to see breakthroughs that can improve their quality of life. Project Revoice rallied community engagement around a new voice cloning program that gives patients the ability to speak freely in their own voice, even after the disease takes it away. The campaign had an earned reach of over 900m, while 41m people joined the conversation on social. Most importantly, in the fi
description_zh: 自從冰桶挑戰為 ALS 協會籌集了超過 1.15 億美元以來，ALS 社區一直渴望看到能夠改善他們生活品質的突破。Project Revoice 圍繞著新聲音召集社區參與

description_en: To curb ecological damage caused by booming tourist numbers, a bold new visa entry process was created for the Palau. Visitors to the Pacific island-country must have an environmental pledge stamped in their passports, which they must sign before an immigration officer. The agreement – dedicated to Palau’s children – is a formal promise to act in an environmentally responsibly way on the island. Violators can be fined up to $1 million.
description_zh: 為了遏制遊客數量激增造成的生態破壞，帛琉制定了大膽的新簽證入境流程。前往這個太平洋島國的遊客必須在護照上蓋章環保承諾，並在入境前簽署。

description_en: The Dallas Trade Mart Speech is a world first, an AI audio speech made completely out of data from hundreds of archive recordings of old JFK speeches. This breakthrough technique involves smart splicing small phonetic fragments of speech – typically around 250,000 individual segments, down to three milliseconds in duration to allow JFK to finally deliver the best speech never heard.
description_zh: 達拉斯貿易市場的演講是世界首創，人工智慧音訊演講完全由數百個甘迺迪舊演講檔案錄音的資料製成。這項突破性技術涉及智慧拼接語音的小語音片段 - 通常

We launched a fashion content series, featuring our

description_en: In 2015, 22,000 Americans died from a prescription overdose. And most Americans think the opioid epidemic is a problem only for addicts. Prescribed to Death is a memorial that humanises the devastation caused: using precision machine crafting, 22,000 faces of real-life fatalities were carved onto pills. The memorial is driving awareness through a nationwide tour, with many adding 'Warn Me' labels to insurance cards, demanding accountability from opioid prescribers.

description_en: In 2017, Christie’s announced that the last privately owned Leonardo da Vinci painting was to be auctioned. It needed to make the sale of the Salvator Mundi a sensation, and the first step was a name that implied urgency: the Last da Vinci. Then, rather than market the sale privately, the auction house spoke publicly about what the work meant to the public. Hidden cameras below the work captured real-life reactions, which were shared on social media. A record $450.3 million sale ensued.

description_en: Honda has four times fewer dealerships in France than its competitors. description_en:
When people search for a place to visit, they make a very quick judgement call based on the images they see. Google’s search results are flooded with inferior mobile photography, meaning small, local businesses often suffer. 
By using Google's new image-based review platform, Local Guides, it's now possible to control images that pop up in the search results. This campaign inspires fans to aid businesses with great Canon photography, simply by 
uploading it through Local Guides.

The World Cup in Russia created a problem for Germany: how to combine working hours and game times because of the different time zones. How do you enable people to sit in meetings and still be able to follow the games?

description_en: Child labor is a worldwide problem. In Brazil, it’s present in every industry sector and specially in handcrafted articles sold to tourists. The articles are beautiful, but they hide child labor. We needed to create a piece to report this situation and alert people, so they are aware of how what they buy is made. Those pieces were manually created with toys glued to form identic patterns in the handcraft pieces sold all over the country, which in several cases were made by children. They are col

description_en:
Background: 

Since its launch, the Blizzard has claimed to be the creamiest ice cream. To prove it, Dairy Queen created a ritual in-store: serving Blizzards upside down promising a spill-free experience or the customer doesn´t pay! Three decades later, this marketing trick became predictable. Even though the Blizzard has introduced new flavors and mixes, the brand needed an original experience that reconnected with its core value: creaminess.

Idea:

If every Blizzard must be served upside down

description_en:
For McDonald's Switzerland's 50th anniversary of the Big Mac, we teamed up with TBWA\Zurich. 50 pieces of art were created to celebrated the changes from 1968 to 2018, during the Big Mac's life. The artwork was displayed in out-of-home posters, tray liners, animated posts online, and sharable gifs.

The campaign won at Cannes: 
2 Bronze Lions (in Illustration – Brand & Communications Design, Art Direction – Outdoor)
13 Shortlists (in Typography – Outdoor, Posters – Retail)

description_en: To mark a tumultuous year, Spotify decided to celebrate how music gave people a reason to keep listening. A global OOH campaign transformed users’ listening data into 2018 Goals. From the personal – including a fan who created an 'I Love Gingers' playlist just for Ed Sheeran – to the political, the brand poked fun at a year that some would rather forget.

description_en:
“3 PM Brainstorms” is a radio campaign created to reinforce Snickers core message that being hungry has consequences, while establishing the fact that 3 PM is the time of the day when people are hungriest. 

The spots are fictional office brainstorms from the past, that all took place at 3 PM.  
In each spot, the characters end up talking themselves into a different, historically bad idea, that ends up changing the way our modern world operates on a daily basis.

「下午 3 點腦力激盪」是一項廣播活動，旨在強化士力架的核心訊息，即飢餓會產生後果，同時確立下午 3 點是人們一天中最飢餓的時間。

這些景點是虛構的辦公室腦力激盪

description_en: Created as part of the campaign for the Assassin’s Creed Syndicate video game, which is set in Victorian England, this poster illustrates that society at the time was no longer controlled by kings, emperors, politicians or religious figures, but rather by money. The campaign composed of real calls to our competitor’s restaurant managers. During said calls, Burger King exposed the reason why other brands don’t flame-grill, uncovering that they prefer to be fast, instead of preferring to have the great taste of flame-grilled beef.

description_en: In 95% of public schools in the United States children practice lockdown drills in case a gunman attacks. The film earned 50 million+

description_en: What do Marmite haters loathe more than Marmite on their toast? Marmite in their butter, jam and marmalade. So adam&eveDDB created a print campaign encouraging Marmite lovers not to dip their Marmite-covered knife into the other spreads at the breakfast table. Print and billboard ads highlighted the disturbing reality of Marmite cross-contamination. The goal: to ensure Marmite lovers and haters can happily co-exist under the same roof.

The challenge was to reassure clinicians that Constant Therapy was the most comprehensive rehab tool available. description_en: Chicago has one of the largest gun violence problems in America. Every week, nearly 40 people are shot across the city. Yet many Chicagoans have become numb to the violence. The Illinois Council Against Handgun Violence needed Chicago, legislators and voters alike, to see the weekly gun violence data in a new light. Most Dangerous Street is a walk-through, week-by-week visualisation of Chicago’s gun violence on one street. FCB Chicago collected real time data around Chicago’s gun violence from p

description_en: Guinness wanted to help people drink more responsibly. So, it rebranded boring old tap water as an exciting new drink: Guinness Clear. At a stroke, it removed the social stigma attached to ordering water in a bar, and turned it into a joke everyone could share. The campaign comprised TV, social, print, ‘Home Brew’ kits, and even rain ponchos. After two months, 80% of consumers we spoke to said they’d moderated their alcohol intake by drinking water.
description_zh: 吉尼斯希望幫助人們更負責任地飲酒。因此，它將乏味的舊自來水重新命名為令人興奮的新飲料：Guinness Clear。一舉消除了在酒吧點水的社會恥辱，並將其變成了每個人的笑話。

description_en: Everyone knows that a bagel isn’t a bagel without cream cheese. But it seems Apple never got the memo. In the campaign, the yellow stroke of the Stabilo Boss highlights three women: NASA mathematician Katherine Johnson, US First Lady Edith Wilson, and Austrian-Swedish physicist Lise Meitner. description_en: Great stories stand the test of time. To celebrate this, TFF reimagined some of today’s most iconic stories, including The Simpsons, Apocalypse Now and This is Spinal Tap, using one of the world’s oldest forms of storytelling: Egyptian hieroglyphics. DDB New York partnered with an Egyptology professor to re-imagine over 100 scenes, staying true to the integrity of the language and its precise artistic forms. An entirely new alphabet was developed for each story. The project was a success for the
description_zh: 偉大的故事經得起時間的考驗。為了慶祝這一點，TFF 使用世界上最古老的講故事形式之一：埃及象形文字，重新構思了一些當今最具標誌性的故事，包括《辛普森一家》、《現代啟示錄》和《This is Spinal Tap》。

description_en: Game of Thrones is one of the deadliest shows of all time, with over 100,000 characters having lost their lives since it began. description_en: The Australian Open is the broadcast opportunity of the year in Australia, as every year its viewership grows and grows. As a result, it is inundated with sponsors and people vying to grab hold of this media moment. It is at a point that people completely tune out of the repetition of sponsors and just start paying attention when the Tennis returns. But Uber Eats cleverly realised they could stand out from this crowd and grab the attention of the audience – by blending perfectly in, with people
description_zh: 澳洲網球公開賽是澳洲一年一度的轉播機會，其收視率逐年成長。結果，贊助商和人們紛紛湧入，競相抓住這媒體時刻。正是在這一點上，人們完成了

campaign_name: The Team That Wouldn’T Be Here
description_en: Every Super Bowl ends the same way. Two teams compete on the field while hundreds of brands compete off of it. Verizon rewrote the playbook by introducing a third team. The Team That Wouldn’t Be Here is a new team of 11 current NFL players and a coach who wouldn’t be alive if first responders hadn’t received their emergency call. As the network that connects millions of emergency calls every day, each story of survival became a demonstration of Verizon’s network reliability when it matters most.
description_zh: 每個超級盃都以相同的方式結束。賽場上有兩支隊伍競爭，場下有數百個品牌競爭。威瑞森透過引入第三支球隊重寫了劇本。The Team That won't Be Here 是一支由 11 名現任 NFL 球員和一名教練組成的新球隊

description_en: Back Market, French startup and European leader of refurbished products, decided to expand to the US. Not an easy feat in a country that loves new gadgets. It didn't have the budget for celebrity influencers - many of whom really wanted Back Market products and had already tweeted about that years ago. description_en:
72% of Germans fly abroad for their holidays. 
How do we make them consider traveling within Germany using German Rail? A side-by-side comparison: One side shows a foreign travel destination; the other a look-alike destination in Germany for just 19€. How do we give this idea relevance & attention on Facebook? With data and technology. First an algorithm found look-alike pictures. Then automated video-ads showed each person the real time flight price from their location to a travel destination t

description_en: In a time when "car" was not even a word yet, and people relied on horses to pull their wagons, one woman challenged the status quo. To prove that her husband’s invention was the future of mobility, Bertha Benz went on the first long-distance journey with an automobile. 131 years later, we celebrate her with a short film launched on International Women’s Day and dedicated to all the brave and visionary ones who stop at nothing to move the world forward.
description_zh: 在「汽車」這個詞還沒有出現、人們依賴馬來拉車的時代，一位女性挑戰了現狀。為了證明丈夫的發明是移動出行的未來，貝莎·本茨進行了第一次長途旅行

description_en:
Andy Warhol eating a Whopper it’s part of a 1982 documentary film called “66 scenes from America”. It features some of the classic traits from Warhol’s work. Mainly, using brands and pop culture as a medium to create his art.
Burger King reversed that same formula and turned the original film into an ad for the brand. But not just any ad, a TV spot in the biggest pop culture event of the world: The Super Bowl.

安迪沃荷吃著皇堡，這是 1982 年紀錄片《來自美國的 66 個場景》的一部分。它具有沃荷作品中的一些經典特徵。主要是利用品牌和流行文化作為媒介來創作他的藝術。

Utilising a nimble crew, Gilette went to the homes of transgender men to witness them shave for the first time. They sat with their families, listened to their stories and created a powerful set of films that celebrated their first shaves. The launch film, First Shave, was shared on Gillette’s social channels and those of LGBTQ

description_en: FIFA18 was crucial for Xbox. But PlayStation had all the FIFA marketing rights. How could we market FIFA when it was forbidden? description_en: Anti-bullying activist Monica Lewinsky wanted to create a sense of community so those being bullied know that they’re not alone. #DefyTheName kicked off with a film showing that some of the most successful people were also called names, but they didn’t let that define who they became. description_zh: 時尚、運動鞋、刺青。作為一個社會，我們使用獨特的表達方式來支持我們的強烈意見。但當談到死亡時，我們常常感到恐懼和不確定。在 MyCoffin 中，新興藝術家為德國著名影響者打造了獨特的棺材。

description_en: Extra Reminder launched in partnership with petrol and retail giant BP. An interactive index was created with over 200 food and drink items that were programmed to interface directly

The site is built around historic arches that date back to its original use as Victorian London’s coal store. The identity uses these shapes to literally frame or house images representing everything you can find there — retailers, history, bars and restaurants, culture, respite and community. It is ever-changing, always unexpected.

description_en: The Carlsberg Foundation supports researchers inside the realms of science, art and culture. For the documentary Almost Human the director interviewed ten internationally acclaimed scientists, about the challenges facing humanity in our encounter with technology and its consequences in a world in constant change. The Carlsberg Foundation's only condition was that a number of the scientists they support should be included in the film – other than that, the director had creative freedom to make th

And as an iconic brand it has weaved its way into South African culture, featuring on social media whenever there was a light-hearted moment or some form of satire. It’s this ability to see the funnier side of life and make fun of ourselves as South Africans that has inspired Doom to use humour in their communication over the years, especially in a segment
description_zh: 六十多年來，《毀滅戰士》因其快速、致命的殺傷力、能有效消滅害蟲而在南非人中廣為人知。作為一個標誌性品牌，它已經融入了南非文化，每當出現在社交媒體上

description_en: This campaign pays homage to the truckers who paved the way for the American dream, shining a spotlight on those unsung heroes who were always present in America’s biggest accomplishments.

description_en: The Restaurant of Mistaken Orders is a restaurant where all the servers have dementia. Because the servers have dementia, there is a possibility that your order might come out mistaken. What you ordered may or may not be what you get served. However, this restaurant puts customers in a frame of mind where a mistaken order can be casually accepted… even appreciated. description_en: In 2015, 22,000 Americans died from a prescription overdose. And most Americans think the opioid epidemic is a problem only for addicts. Prescribed to Death is a memorial that humanises the devastation caused: using precision machine crafting, 22,000 faces of real-life fatalities were carved onto pills. The memorial is driving awareness through a nationwide tour, with many adding 'Warn Me' labels to insurance cards, demanding accountability from opioid prescribers.

description_en: Samsung Unpacked 2019 was the most anticipated mobile event of the year. Would the first foldable smartphone, the Galaxy Fold, finally be revealed?   With the rumors, speculations and fan leaks already swirling, we embraced the confusion surrounding the event and added to it in a way that only Samsu
description_zh: Samsung Unpacked 2019 是年度最受期待的行動盛會。第一款可折疊智慧型手機 Galaxy Fold 最終會發布嗎？隨著謠言、猜測和粉絲洩密的不斷蔓延，我們接受了周遭的混亂

description_en: To celebrate 100 years of Bauhaus, Leica created the Leica CL 100 Jahre Bauhaus limited edition camera. To launch it, a series of studies were done using geometric shapes from the camera’s composition. Each one was influenced by the techniques and theories taught during Bauhaus workshops and classes from 1919 to 1933. In the end, the studies resulted in five families of posters, each with three unique pieces.
description_zh: 為了慶祝包浩斯 100 週年，徠卡推出了徠卡 CL 100 Jahre Bauhaus 限量版相機。為了推出它，我們使用相機構成中的幾何形狀進行了一系列研究。每一件作品都受到技術和主題的影響

description_en: Proving that believing in yourself pays off.
description_zh: 證明相信自己是有回報的。

description_en: The Hellmann’s Real Food Rescue is a program we helped create that recovers excess food after stadium events and delivers it to local food banks. Learn more about Ogilvy's Experience,Experience capabilities at Ogilvy Canada.
description_zh: Hellmann’s Real Food Rescue 是我們幫助創建的一項計劃，該計劃在體育場活動結束後回收多餘的食物並將其運送到當地的食品銀行。了解更多有關奧美體驗、奧美加拿大體驗能力的資訊。

description_en: As an organization born in Parkland, Change the Ref seeks to empower not only those who can vote on gun laws, but also the youth who will be affected by these decisions. Therefore, we wanted to target anyone who lives in Florida, regardless of age. We wanted to make an impact on Floridians minds by showing them how they over-index in every gun-related issued. To do so, we compared Florida’s gun data with the data of several other states combined showing that Florida’s numbers were always higher.
description_zh: 作為一個誕生於帕克蘭的組織，「改變裁判」不僅致力於賦予那些可以對槍支法進行投票的人的權力，而且還賦予將受到這些決定影響的年輕人的權力。因此，我們希望針對居住在佛羅裡達州的任何人，無論年齡大小。瓦

description_en: An international award show that recognizes and celebrates the innovation and creativity in digital and social media, by brands, agencies, nonprofits and individuals.
description_zh: 這是一項國際頒獎典禮，旨在表彰和慶祝品牌、機構、非營利組織和個人在數位和社交媒體方面的創新和創造力。

description_en: Diversity and inclusion programs are all the rage in the business world. However, while 90% of multinational corporations claim to prioritise diversity, only 4% prioritise disability – something that affects 1/5th of the world’s population. This campaign for The Valuable 500 holds global business leaders accountable for disability inclusion, using a satirical film to expose the toe-curling reality of selective inclusion in the business community. In the ten days following the campaign launch, 51
description_zh: 多元化和包容性計劃在商界風靡一時。然而，雖然 90% 的跨國公司聲稱優先考慮多樣性，但只有 4% 的跨國公司優先考慮殘疾問題——殘疾問題影響著全球 1/5 的人口。這個營地

description_en: In Lebanon, a Muslim and Christian cannot marry each other. In order to celebrate creativity for progressive change, this Absolut campaign brought inter-religious civil marriage the closest it has ever been to Lebanon. Only 12 miles off Lebanese shores is international waters where Lebanese marital law no longer applies. As a world-first the Civil Love boat set sail to marry inter-religious couples and celebrate unity & love in a country torn by Civil War.
description_zh: 在黎巴嫩，穆斯林和基督徒不能結婚。為了慶祝漸進變革的創造力，這項 Absolut 活動使宗教間民事婚姻變得最接近黎巴嫩。距離黎巴嫩海岸僅 12 英里

description_en: "ASPIRATION & PERSPIRATION" is a visual design created for the 2018 Dentsu Advertising Awards. The awards, which honor advertisers for the excellence of their communication strategies, are Japan's oldest advertising awards. For 2018, we chose rice planting as a culturally relevant motif, and showed rice being planted in a variety of unusual patterns to reflect the innovative strategies that advertisers employ to achieve success. The design also evokes the timeless nature of the year-in, year-out
description_zh: 「ASPIRATION & PESPIRATION」是為2018年電通廣告獎創作的視覺設計。該獎項旨在表彰廣告商卓越的傳播策略，是日本歷史最悠久的廣告獎。2018年，我們選擇了米PL

brand: Kiyan Prince Foundation, Ea Sports, Qpr, Match Attax
description_en: In 2006, Kiyan Prince, a footballer on Queens Park Rangers' youth team, was stabbed to death outside his school. If he were alive today, Kiyan would be 30 years old and living the dream as a professional footballer. What better way to show the impact of knife crime than to show the life that Kiyan would have had today? On the 15th anniversary of his passing, Kiyan became a character in FIFA21. His name was added to the QPR squad, he got his own Match Attax card and became the face of JD, the UK'
description_zh: 2006年，女王公園巡遊者隊青年隊足球員基揚‧普林斯(Kiyan Prince)在學校外被刺死。如果基揚今天還活著，他已經 30 歲了，正在實現職業足球員的夢想。有什麼更好的方式來展現影響力

description_en: Introducing the term “Dyslexic Thinking” by showing how history has been shaped by those who were/are dyslexic.
description_zh: 透過展示那些曾經/正在閱讀困難的人如何塑造歷史，引入「閱讀困難思維」一詞。

This pioneering venture marks the inception of the first eCycling team for incarcerated individuals. Through a collaborative effort with De Rode Antraciet vzw, Cellmade vzw, and Oudenaarde prison, Decathlon has provided prisoners with essential clothing and equipment, including bicycles and trainers, tailored for participation in Zwift, a virtual cycling platform boasting a c
description_zh: 迪卡侬在比利时奥德纳尔德一座最高安全级别的监狱内启动了一项开创性计划。這項開創性的事業標誌著第一個針對被監禁者的電動自行車團隊的成立。透過協同效應

description_en: The book 'The Portuguese (Re)Constitution' is a reformulation of the Portuguese Constitution of 1933, released on April the 25th 2022, on Portugal's "National Freedom Day'.

description_en: During Super Bowl 56, Coinbase aired a full 60-second slot offering free Bitcoin, leading to an overwhelming response that temporarily brought down the crypto firm's app. The ad, created by Accenture Song, featured a bouncing QR code prompting viewers to scan for a chance to win $3 million and receive $15 worth of free Bitcoin upon signup. Coinbase CMO Kate Rouch emphasized the importance of experiencing crypto firsthand, leading to the massive giveaway.
description_zh: 在第 56 屆超級盃比賽期間，Coinbase 播出了一個長達 60 秒的免費比特幣時段，引起了熱烈反響，導致該加密公司的應用程式暫時癱瘓。廣告由埃森哲宋製作，以彈跳二維碼提示觀眾

description_en: The Lil Sugar campaign used rap, storytelling and gaming to make nutrition literacy fun and turn kids into experts on sugar. The music video was the primary driver of a larger campaign. The song, co-written and performed by rap icon Darryl DMC McDaniels from Run-DMC, exposed many of Lil Sugar's disguises and drove viewers to download the Lil Sugar app on their phones after watching the video. The film drew inspiration from famous CGI animated kids' movies as well as the swagger of 90s rap music
description_zh: Lil Sugar 活動利用說唱、講故事和遊戲來讓營養知識變得有趣，並將孩子們變成糖方面的專家。音樂錄影帶是一場更大活動的主要推動力。這首歌由饒舌偶像達裡爾·DMC·麥克丹尼 (Darryl DMC McDani) 共同創作並演唱

description_en: Introducing Ralph, the spokes-bunny of Humane Society International’s global campaign to ban animal testing for cosmetics. #SaveRalph is a powerful stop-motion animation short film featuring an all-star multinational cast including Taika Waititi, Ricky Gervais, Zac Efron, Olivia Munn, Pom Klementieff, Tricia Helfer and more. https://www.hsi.org/saveralphmovie/
description_zh: 介紹一下拉爾夫，他是國際人道協會全球禁止化妝品動物測試運動的發言人。#SaveRalph 是一部震撼人心的定格動畫短片，由多國演員陣容組成，包括 Taika Waititi、Ric

description_en: In India, life threatening diseases like dengue and malaria had been at an all-time high, despite it not being the monsoon season. Indians often use mosquito repellent coils to fight mosquitoes inside the home, but the real problem was outside: authorities found that garbage collection points were acting as breeding grounds for these diseases. So Maxx Flash, a mosquito repellent brand, introduced The Killer Pack. Its 100% biodegradable, innovative packaging was lined with 5% Active Probiotic Bac
description_zh: 在印度，儘管不是季風季節，登革熱和瘧疾等危及生命的疾病仍處於歷史最高水準。印度人經常在家裡使用驅蚊香來消滅蚊子，但真正的問題在外面：autho

description_en: The coral reefs worldwide are facing a dire crisis, with their health in rapid decline. In response, the Mars cat food brand Sheba has initiated a bold restoration program in collaboration with AMV BBDO, Mars Sustainable Solutions, and the Sheba brand team. The program's inception was marked by the creation of a monumental word, "Hope," standing at a towering height of 35 meters. Positioned off the coast of Sulawesi in Indonesia’s Spermonde Archipelago, this word is not merely a symbol but a liv
description_zh: 全世界的珊瑚礁正面臨嚴峻的危機，其健康狀況迅速惡化。作為回應，瑪氏貓糧品牌 Sheba 與 AMV BBDO、瑪氏永續解決方案和 Sheba 品牌合作發起了一項大膽的修復計劃

description_en: Historically, camera technology hasn’t accurately represented darker skin tones. Google partnered with a diverse group of image experts including photographers, cinematographers and colourists, who are celebrated for their beautiful and accurate imagery of people of colour. The result is Real Tone, a collection of technical improvements to the Pixel 6 camera and Google Photos that more accurately and beautifully highlight the nuances of all skin tones. The campaign spread across social channels,
description_zh: 從歷史上看，相機技術並不能準確地呈現較深的膚色。Google 與包括攝影師、電影攝影師和調色師在內的多元化影像專家團隊合作，他們以美麗而準確的影像而聞名

description_en: 32% of women around the world feel uncomfortable swimming in public. In the Middle East, it's 88%. So adidas created the world's first swimmable billboard in Dubai, encouraging every woman in the city to dive in and become ambassadors for its new inclusive swimwear collection, regardless of their shape, ethnicity or ability. It sparked a global conversation across 60 countries about making swimming more inclusive as a sport for women.
description_zh: 全球 32% 的女性在公共場合游泳感到不舒服。在中東，這一比例為88%。因此，阿迪達斯在杜拜創建了世界上第一個可游泳的廣告牌，鼓勵這座城市的每位女性潛水並成為其新公司的大使。

description_en: Decathlon has initiated a groundbreaking program within the confines of a maximum-security prison in Oudenaarde, Belgium. This pioneering venture marks the inception of the first eCycling team for incarcerated individuals. Through a collaborative effort with De Rode Antraciet vzw, Cellmade vzw, and Oudenaarde prison, Decathlon has provided prisoners with essential clothing and equipment, including bicycles and trainers, tailored for participation in Zwift, a virtual cycling platform boasting a c
description_zh: 迪卡儂在比利時奧德納爾德一座最高安全級別的監獄內啟動了一項開創性計畫。這項開創性的事業標誌著第一個針對被監禁者的電動自行車團隊的成立。透過協同效應

description_en: Lebanon is collapsing thanks to the ruling political class, which has dominated since the 1990s. Elections gave people hope, but a corrupt government tried to postpone them in a bid to maintain power. One of its excuses is the shortage of ink and paper to print ballots, so AnNahar published an Elections Edition: one that never went to print. Instead, the paper and ink from the unprinted edition was sent to the government's printing associates to print ballots. Enough was donated to cover all of
description_zh: 由於自 20 世紀 90 年代以來一直佔據主導地位的統治政治階級，黎巴嫩正在崩潰。選舉給人們帶來了希望，但腐敗的政府試圖推遲選舉以維持權力。其藉口之一是墨水和紙張短缺

all_categories: Radio & Audio, Brand Experience & Activation, Social & Influencer, Titanium
description_en: The Unfiltered History Tour is a guerrilla tour of the British Museum's stolen artefacts. Using Instagram Augmented Reality filters, visitors can scan the museum's disputed artefacts and see them being teleported back in time to their countries of origin. It also relays violent moments in history with the help of ten experts from those countries. The visuals were inspired by Akira Kurosawa's black and white films, and were designed to match the emotional stories told by the experts.
description_zh: 未經過濾的歷史之旅是對大英博物館被盜文物的遊擊之旅。使用 Instagram 擴增實境過濾器，參觀者可以掃描博物館有爭議的文物，並看到它們被及時傳送回他們的國家或地區

description_en: Little Black Book, The Missing Chapter
description_zh: 小黑書，缺的章節

description_en: After a year of lockdowns in Malaysia, thousands of low-income families started flying white flags outside their homes as a cry for help, signalling that they have run out of work, money and food. Cadbury responded by creating flags in its iconic shade of purple for those who wanted to help. Distributed in affluent neighbourhoods, people could put up a purple flag to indicate that they have excess food and supplies to give away. Donations were then collected from homes with purple flags and pass
description_zh: 馬來西亞封鎖一年後，數千個低收入家庭開始在自家門外懸掛白旗以求救，這表明他們已經耗盡了工作、金錢和食物。吉百利的回應是在其標誌性的sha上製作旗幟

description_en: To understand what consumers in the US prefer to drink with their burgers, Pepsi commissioned a third-party blind taste test to discover how burgers from the top three chains in the US paired with different beverages. The results: participants preferred Pepsi over Coke, an insight that formed the basis of the #BetterWithPepsi campaign. The campaign involved an origami artist, who used burger wrappers to make new creations, and generated reactions globally, earning more than 3.6 billion impressio
description_zh: 為了了解美國消費者喜歡搭配漢堡喝什麼，百事可樂委託第三方進行了盲味測試，以了解美國三大連鎖店的漢堡如何與不同飲料搭配。結果：參與者更喜歡

description_en:
'The Art of Stealing', a unique campaign by Gong to promote the Netflix series Lupin, took a swipe at Poland's most valuable painting, Leonardo da Vinci's ‘Lady with an Ermine’. ‘The Art of Stealing’ is a symbolic heist, which is perfect for Netflix’s hit series about a gentleman burglar.
 
As part of the campaign, agency Gong got the Polish National Museum to exhibit a fake painting where the necklace was missing. This trick was executed both inside and outside of the museum where Gong bought a
description_zh: 「偷竊的藝術」是龔為宣傳 Netflix 系列《盧平》而發起的一場獨特活動，它對波蘭最有價值的畫作——列奧納多·達·芬奇的《抱銀貂的女士》進行了猛烈攻擊。《偷竊的藝術》是一場象徵性的搶劫，非常適合 Netflix”

description_en: The Amazon rainforest is losing the war against illegal deforestation. By using a loophole in the 1951 U.N. Refugee Convention, which defines a refugee as any living being that is persecuted and whose life is at risk in their home country, an asylum request was made for a Jatobá tree – an endangered tree species in the Amazon. The requests were sent to foreign ambassadors and printed across OOH advertisements next to over 100 embassies in Brazil.
description_zh: 亞馬遜雨林在打擊非法砍伐森林的戰爭中正在失敗。利用 1951 年《聯合國難民公約》中的漏洞，該公約將難民定義為在本國受到迫害且生命面臨危險的任何生物，即庇護所

description_en: Macma, the non-profit organization dedicated to support women with breast cancer, has debuted a new interactive exhibition which invites visitors to touch the museum’s works of art with the aim of learning how to recognize the possible symptoms of breast cancer through palpation. Learn more about Ogilvy's Relationship Design,Health capabilities at Ogilvy.
description_zh: Macma 是一個致力於支持乳癌女性的非營利組織，推出了一個新的互動展覽，邀請參觀者觸摸博物館的藝術作品，目的是學習如何識別乳癌可能出現的症狀。

all_categories: Outdoor, Sustainable Development Goals, Brand Experience & Activation
description_en: In the summer of 2021, Corona piloted its first #PlasticFishingTournament in Sinaloa, Mexico, paying local anglers to go out to sea, not to catch fish, but to retrieve plastic waste. More than 100 fishermen removed 3 tons of plastic from the ocean.
description_zh: 2021 年夏天，Corona 在墨西哥錫那羅亞州試行了首個 #PlasticFishingTournament，付費讓當地釣客出海，不是為了捕魚，而是為了回收塑膠垃圾。100多名漁民從海洋中清除了3噸塑膠。

description_en: Heinz was starting to see brand affinity scores decline as competitors stole share. The objective was to re-ignite an emotional connection with Heinz in a culturally relevant way to bolster consumer loyalty. The truth is, Heinz is ketchup. Rethink needed to find a way to prove this. To uncover this unspoken association it conducted a social experiment with participants from 18 countries, anonymously asking a group of people to simply draw ketchup. The result? The quality of the drawings ranged,
description_zh: 隨著競爭對手搶佔市場份額，亨氏開始發現品牌親和力得分下降。目標是以文化相關的方式重新點燃與亨氏的情感聯繫，以增強消費者的忠誠度。事實上，亨氏是番茄醬。重新思考

description_en: Because IKEA is so affordable, many people see its products as disposable. To show just how little it takes to give furniture a new life, IKEA launched The Trash Collection 2021. For nine days, the retailer collected real IKEA products which had been thrown away at the dump or abandoned. After some light refurbishment, the items were sold a new collection back at IKEA and documented the journey in as part of a brutally honest 360-degree campaign.
description_zh: 由於宜家的價格非常實惠，許多人將其產品視為一次性產品。為了展示賦予家具新生命是多麼簡單，宜家推出了 2021 年垃圾收集。在 9 天的時間裡，零售商收集了真正的宜家產品，這些產品是

description_en: Harley-Davidson wanted to help Sikh motorcyclists get out on the open road. The result was Tough Turban: an alternative to a motorcycle helmet. The ground-breaking innovation meant that Sikh motorcyclists no longer have to choose between their beliefs and their safety.
description_zh: 哈雷戴維森希望幫助錫克教摩托車手在開闊的道路上行駛。結果就是 Tough Turban：摩托車安全帽的替代品。這項突破性的創新意味著錫克教摩托車手不再需要在他們的信仰之間做出選擇

Individually.

description_en: Vienna is home to some of the world’s most iconic artworks.  100 years ago, Gustav Klimt, Egon Schiele, Koloman Moser and many more fought for the free expression of their art. 100 years later, social media algorithms make their fight obsolete and label Viennese art pornographic leading to blocked accounts and deleted posts. We wanted to bring the discussion about nude art back to where it belongs: in the hands of people, not algorithms.

description_en: Coded: The Hidden Love of J.C. Leyendecker tells the story of legendary illustrator J.C. Leyendecker, a gay man whose early 20th century advertisements were coded with LGBTQ+ imagery that quietly acknowledged a community that was forced to live in the closet. The documentary explores Leyendecker's legacy as a grandfather of modern advertising, showing how today’s LGBTQ+ advertisements are built upon a foundation laid by his work.
description_zh: 《編碼：J.C. Leyendecker 隱藏的愛》講述了傳奇插畫家 J.C. Leyendecker 的故事，他是一位同性戀者，他在 20 世紀初的廣告中使用了 LGBTQ+ 圖像，悄悄承認了一個被迫生活在現實中的群體。
