campaign_name: An Ad In An Ad In An Ad

description_en: AFC Richmond and its coach, Ted Lasso, became the first ever completely fictional team to be real playable characters in the world’s most popular sports video game, FIFA 23. The project was an equal partnership between two entertainment giants. The reach of FIFA 23 exposed more people to Ted Lasso, while people's love of Ted Lasso brought more people to FIFA 23 in return. It created billions of earned impressions across social and digital media, and allowed Ted Lasso fans to interact with their
description_zh: AFC Richmond 及其教練 Ted Lasso 成為世界上最受歡迎的體育電玩遊戲《FIFA 23》中第一支完全虛構的球隊，成為真正的可玩角色。該項目是兩個娛樂巨頭之間的平等合作夥伴關係。的r

brand: B3 Stock Exchange & United Nations Global Compact

description_en: The history of Stella Artois dates back to 1366 in Leuven, Belgium. This means there is a probability that the beer portrayed in historical art pieces throughout Europe could be a Stella Artois. We developed an algorithm that analyzed each painting and cross-referenced that data with the brand's ext
description_zh: Stella Artois的歷史可以追溯到1366年的比利時魯汶。這意味著整個歐洲歷史藝術作品中描繪的啤酒很可能是時代啤酒。我們開發了一種演算法來分析每幅畫

description_en: Cadbury Celebrations takes hyper-personalised brand communication a step further  by allowing small local businesses to make India's biggest celebrity – Shah Rukh Khan – their own brand ambassador. The AI generative technology creates a digital avatar of Shah Rukh Khan by recreating his face and voice, one for each of the four types of shop in the Cadbury distribution network: fashion, footwear, general and electronics. The local store owners were also given a platform to create and share their
description_zh: 吉百利慶典 (Cadbury Celebrations) 允許當地小型企業聘請印度最大的名人——沙魯克汗 (Shah Rukh Khan) 作為自己的品牌大使，從而將超個性化的品牌傳播更進一步。AI生成技術創造數位化身

description_en: By 2022, France had 1 million electric cars, but only 80,000 charging stations, creating challenges for EV owners, especially during long trips and in remote areas. Renault aimed to rapidly expand the charging network without the hassle of building public stations, ensuring accessibility for all drivers.
description_zh: 到 2022 年，法國擁有 100 萬輛電動車，但只有 8 萬個充電站，這給電動車車主帶來了挑戰，特別是在長途旅行和偏遠地區。雷諾的目標是快速擴大充電網絡，而無需建立充電站的麻煩

campaign_name: Adlam: An Alphabet To Preserve A Culture
description_en:
The language of the Fulani people of West Africa, known as Pulaar, is spoken by over 40 million people, but for most of history, the language had no alphabet. Determined to preserve their native language since they were children, the Barry brothers created ADLaM, a handwritten alphabet for their people.
 
Yet the need remained to digitize the alphabet so it could be used to communicate in the modern digital world, empowering the Fulani people to conduct business, connect through social media and
description_zh: 西非富拉尼人的語言稱為普拉爾（Pulaar），有超過 4000 萬人使用，但在歷史的大部分時間裡，這種語言都沒有字母表。巴里兄弟從小就決心保留自己的母語，

description_en: Two days after Serena Williams announced her retirement, Nike released a year-long study in the form of avatars, which showcased her commitment to staying on the top of her game for over two decades. After analysing all data and footage from official tournaments throughout her career, machine learning was used to model her playing style across different eras. To make it accessible to everyone, AKQA turned the study into a live virtual match. It starred 17-year-old Serena, the age she was when sh
description_zh: 在 Serena Williams 宣布退休兩天后，耐吉以頭像形式發布了一項為期一年的研究，其中展示了她二十多年來致力於保持比賽巔峰的承諾。在分析了官方的所有數據和鏡頭後

description_en: To celebrate World Down Syndrome Day, adidas collaborated with creative agency FCB Canada and director Jason Van Bruggen to tell the story of adidas’ first sponsored athlete with Down Syndrome, Chris Nikic. As Chris is a triathlete, marathon runner and the world’s first Ironman with Down Syndrome, the campaign reserved the runner BIB 321 for Chris to race with in the Boston Marathon - with extended plans to allow all neurodivergent athletes to wear BIB 321 in future events too.
description_zh: 為了慶祝世界唐氏綜合症日，阿迪達斯與創意機構 FCB Canada 和總監 Jason Van Bruggen 合作，講述了阿迪達斯贊助的第一位患有唐氏綜合症的運動員克里斯·尼克奇 (Chris Nikic) 的故事。由於克里斯是鐵人三項運動員，馬拉松運動員

description_en: Beautiful Life is a cautionary tale about the US’s easy access to, and fascination with, guns. The video follows teenagers playing Russian roulette with a parent’s revolver. As each player holds the gun up to their temple, their lives flash before their eyes. With each pull of the trigger, the chance of death rises and each player deals with varying levels of fear. Overconfidence and recklessness underline the core themes of the film: life is beautiful and precious, and conforming to what others
description_zh: 《美麗生活》是一個警示故事，講述了美國很容易獲得槍支並迷戀槍支。影片講述了青少年用父母的左輪手槍玩俄羅斯輪盤賭的故事。當每個玩家將槍舉到太陽穴時，他們的生命在眼前閃過。

description_en: People think they know what ‘suicidal’ looks like: crying, anger, despair. In the absence of these signs, nobody intervenes. With 125 people taking their own lives each week, long-term partners Campaign Against Living Miserably (CALM) and ITV, the UK’s largest commercial TV station, urgently needed to highlight the fact that ‘suicidal’ doesn’t always manifest the way people expect. So on the happiest day of the year, adam&eveDDB worked with them to created The Last Photo, a hard-hitting campaign
description_zh: 人們認為他們知道「自殺」是什麼樣的：哭泣、憤怒、絕望。如果沒有這些跡象，就沒有人幹預。每週有 125 人自殺，長期合作夥伴反對悲慘生活運動 (CALM) 和英國獨立電視台 (ITV)

description_en: Live recorded on March 15th, 2020
description_zh: 2020年3月15日現場錄製

description_en: The Korean National Police Agency's (KNPA) 'Knock Knock' campaign introduces an inclusive police emergency call solution for people in a situation where they cannot speak. An idea that was inspired by Morse code. Based in Seoul, the advertising agency Cheil Worldwide has created this solution that allows victims in dangerous situations to alert the police by tapping on any number, without saying anything.
description_zh: 韓國國家警察廳 (KNPA) 的「Knock Knock」活動為無法說話的人們推出了一種包容性的警察緊急呼叫解決方案。這個想法的靈感來自摩斯電碼。總部位於首爾的廣告公司

cannes_category: Grand Prix For Good / Health & Wellness
all_categories: Grand Prix For Good / Health & Wellness
description_en: Developed by Publicis Groupe, the ad campaign debuted during the 2023 Super Bowl, aiming to shed light on the importance of supporting colleagues dealing with cancer in the workplace. While previous campaigns on cancer have often focused on its impact on individuals or families, this new initiative takes a different approach by exploring its effects on working life.
description_zh: 該廣告活動由陽獅集團 (Publicis Groupe) 開發，在 2023 年超級盃期間首次亮相，旨在闡明支持同事在工作場所應對癌症的重要性。雖然先前的癌症運動往往關注其對癌症的影響

description_en: New Zealand life insurance provider, Partners Life, has partnered with Special New Zealand to deliver a disruptive advertising campaign, The Last Performance, challenging Kiwis to rethink preconceptions around life insurance.
description_zh: 紐西蘭人壽保險公司 Partners Life 與 Special New Zealand 合作推出了顛覆性的廣告活動“The Last Performance”，挑戰紐西蘭人重新思考對人壽保險的偏見。

description_en: Little Black Book, My Japan Railway
description_zh: 小黑書，我的日本鐵路

description_en: Dove is spearheading the #NoDigitalDistortion movement, urging people to reject the new Bold Glamour filter. Developed by Ogilvy and DAVID, the influencer-led campaign aims to raise awareness about the harmful effects of the filter on social media users. Within just seven days, the hashtag has garnered over 365 million views, highlighting its widespread impact.
description_zh: Dove 正在帶頭髮起 #NoDigitalDistortion 運動，敦促人們拒絕新的 Bold Glamour 濾鏡。這項由影響者主導的活動由奧美和大衛發起，旨在提高人們對過濾器對美國社交媒體有害影響的認識

description_en: Argentina's fervent passion for football reached new heights as Lionel Messi, after enduring numerous lost finals over 36 years, finally clinched the World Cup victory. Breaking a spell that had loomed over the nation for more than three decades, Argentina erupted in unprecedented jubilation. Amidst the euphoria, one question consumed the minds of the people: When would the coveted trophy arrive in the country, igniting nationwide celebrations?
description_zh: 阿根廷隊對足球的狂熱熱情達到了新的高度，梅西在36年的決賽中屢屢失利後，終於贏得了世界盃的勝利。Arg 打破了籠罩這個國家三十多年的魔咒

description_en: British Airways launched a groundbreaking multi-channel campaign called A British Original, which celebrates British Airways’ people, its customers, and the nation. The campaign explores the myriad reasons people travel, whether it's to reconnect with loved ones, to take some time out, or to be immersed in a different culture. A British Original encompassed over 500 unique print, digital, and outdoor executions and over 32 different short films.
description_zh: 英國航空發起了一項名為「英國原創」的開創性多通路活動，旨在向英國航空員工、客戶和國家致敬。該活動探討了人們旅行的無數原因，無論是為了重新聯繫智慧

description_en: In 2022, DoorDash marked Valentine’s Day with the introduction of same-day flower delivery from local florists, aiming mainly for awareness. By 2023, DoorDash had evolved beyond food delivery and sought a standout idea to rival both Uber Eats and 1-800-Flowers in the flower delivery market. Recognizing the focus of competitors on traditional couples, DoorDash aimed to stand out by prioritizing and celebrating other forms of love often overlooked in Valentine's Day conversations.
description_zh: 2022 年，DoorDash 為慶祝情人節推出了當地花店當天送花服務，主要目的是提高知名度。到 2023 年，DoorDash 已經超越了食品配送領域，並尋求一個可以與 Uber Eats 和 1-8 競爭的出色創意

description_en:

簡單，俏皮，喜歡！

description_en: Flipvertising managed to resonate with ad-sceptical millennials and Gen Z. To launch the new Samsung Galaxy Z Flip4, CHEP used an innovative approach to flip the media targeting model on its head. The agency created a YouTube pre-roll that contained a free Flip4, then made it almost impossible to get served this elusive ad. The process of doing this had even Google’s own technologists scratching their heads. The best part? With every search, the audience changed their algorithm to show them endl
description_zh: Flipvertising 成功引起了對廣告持懷疑態度的千禧世代和 Z 世代的共鳴。為了推出新款三星 Galaxy Z Flip4，CHEP 採用了創新方法來徹底顛覆媒體定位模式。該機構製作了一個 YouTube 前貼片廣告，其中包含

description_en: Mastercard views Financial Inclusion not only as a core aspect of its brand identity but also as a fundamental business strategy. By expanding access to economic opportunities, Mastercard believes it benefits individuals, society, and the company itself. This campaign embodies Mastercard's ethos of "Doing well, by doing good," leveraging data responsibly to serve society. Through initiatives like the Where to Settle project, Mastercard demonstrates its commitment to assisting Ukrainian refugees
description_zh: 萬事達卡不僅將普惠金融視為其品牌形象的核心，而且將其視為基本業務策略。萬事達卡相信，透過擴大獲得經濟機會的機會，它有利於個人、社會和公司。

description_en: Two days before the World Cup, Budweiser was banned from selling beer at stadiums in Qatar. The brand were left with thousands of liters of beer without a home. The news took the world by storm. And it seemed as though our multi-million dollar presence was a bust.
description_zh: 世界盃前兩天，百威啤酒被禁止在卡達體育場銷售啤酒。該品牌的數千公升啤酒無家可歸。這個消息震驚了全世界。看起來我們的數百萬美元的存在

description_en:
It takes two to make a thing go right and everyone knows that Corona and limes go together like 
fried food and heartburn. So when lime imports to China were disrupted by Covid, the AB InBev-owned beer brand partnered with local authorities to identify low-income areas in Sichuan Province where local farmers could be trained to grow limes.

description_en: Tuvalu, a low-lying Pacific nation, is facing a serious challenge. If sea levels continue to rise at the current rate, the entire country will be submerged in a matter of decades – and will become unlivable well before then. Tuvaluan minister Simon Kofe was scheduled to speak at COP27, the UN Climate Change Conference. It was expected to be a typical diplomatic address to the assembled delegates and reporters. However, Minister Kofe used the moment to unveil a radical plan for survival:  Tuvalu
description_zh: 圖瓦盧是一個地勢低窪的太平洋國家，正面臨嚴峻的挑戰。如果海平面繼續以目前的速度上升，整個國家將在幾十年內被淹沒 — — 並在此之前就變得不適合居住。吐瓦魯部長 Simon K

description_en:
Every night millions and millions of us experience periodsomnia. 
But just because periods never sleep, why shouldn’t we? 
Join our quest for sleep #periodsomnia

每天晚上，數以百萬計的人都會經歷睡眠障礙。
但正因為月經從不睡覺，我們為什麼不應該呢？
加入我們對睡眠的追求#periodsomnia

description_en:
Back in 2013, Skittles did something that seemed pretty unremarkable - they replaced Lime Skittles with Green Apple. That decision immediately incited a massive consumer complaint campaign that raged uninterrupted for nine straight years. 
So when Skittles finally decided to bring back lime in 2022, we knew we couldn't just sweep all that anger under the rug. Instead, we chose to apologize to our critics in the most un-corporate way we could think of... 
Individually.
description_zh:
早在 2013 年，Skittles 就做了一件看起來相當不起眼的事——他們用青蘋果取代了 Lime Skittles。這項決定立即引發了一場大規模的消費者投訴運動，該運動連續九年不間斷地進行。
所以當Sk

The Jane/Finch Centre (JFC) took advantage of a loophole in Twitch, the gamer streaming service owned by Amazon. Amazon Prime Members are given $3.50 to subscribe to a streamer, and any money that's unused goes right back to Amazon. So Angry Butterfly turned JFC into a verified Twitch streamer, in a campaign where none of the m
description_zh: 《Bill It to Bezos》是 2022 年羅賓漢的故事，講述了當地社區中心與世界上最強大的公司之一之間的故事，並結合了巧妙的技術扭曲。簡/芬奇中心 (JFC) 利用 Twitch 的漏洞，讓玩家

description_en: A month before the 2022 FIFA World Cup, Nike dropped the most expensive Brazil jersey ever. Flash, a benefits card accepted in more than 2 million stores, took advantage of fans’ protests about the price of the jersey and offered them a sponsorship deal. 'Cashback For Your Jerseys Back' gave a 50% refund to every fan who purchased the jersey on Nike’s online store, customised it with 'Flash', and posted it on social media. Even Nike noticed the campaign – within a week, the brand blocked people
description_zh: 在 2022 年 FIFA 世界盃開賽前一個月，Nike發布了有史以來最昂貴的巴西球衣。Flash是一張被超過200萬家商店接受的福利卡，利用球迷對球衣價格的抗議，向他們提供贊助

description_en: In partnership with the Society for Family Health-Rwanda, Raid launched 'Certified Care' - a vocational program officially certifying women as Community Healthcare Workers and finally giving them a way to earn a living wage for something they've spent a lifetime doing for free: caring for those with malaria.
description_zh: Raid 與盧安達家庭健康協會合作推出了「認證護理」——一項職業計劃，正式認證女性為社區保健工作者，並最終為她們提供了一種賺取生活工資的方法

description_en: Dr Rick is the pioneer of the ‘parentamorphosis’ field, teaching people how to not act like their parents after they buy their first home. But unfortunately, there’s only one Dr Rick. And since he can only reach so many sufferers with his videos, seminars and classes, he’s branched out into an unconquered medium – the audio book. Dr Rick Will See You Now is like a one-on-one session with the man himself, filled with the strategies, exercises, and good old-fashioned advice you need to un-become y
description_zh: 里克博士是「父母變態」領域的先驅，教導人們在購買第一套房子後如何不要表現得像父母一樣。但不幸的是，只有瑞克博士一個。由於他只能透過他的影片接觸到這麼多的患者，所以掃描電子顯微鏡

description_en: Heinz was starting to see brand affinity scores decline as competitors stole share. The objective was to re-ignite an emotional connection with Heinz in a culturally relevant way to bolster consumer loyalty. The truth is, Heinz is ketchup. Rethink needed to find a way to prove this. To uncover this unspoken association it conducted a social experiment with participants from 18 countries, anonymously asking a group of people to simply draw ketchup. The result? The quality of the drawings ranged,
description_zh: 隨著競爭對手搶佔市場份額，亨氏開始發現品牌親和力得分下降。目標是以文化相關的方式重新點燃與亨氏的情感聯繫，以增強消費者的忠誠度。事實上，亨氏是番茄醬。重新思考

description_en: Domestic abuse cases rise by up to 38% during major football events. For 1.6 million women, the football World Cup is a time of fear not celebration. The 2022 tournament was also held during winter for the first time, so more abusers would be at home, posing an even greater risk. Women’s Aid, a small domestic abuse charity, needed the entire nation to support these women. House 337 took England’s famous football chant, It’s Coming Home, and changed one word to give it a powerful new meaning: He'
description_zh: 在重大足球賽事期間，家庭暴力案件上升高達 38%。對於 160 萬名女性來說，足球世界盃是一個充滿恐懼而不是慶祝的時刻。2022 年的比賽也首次在冬季舉行，因此更多施虐者會留在家裡

description_en: Every year in Yoro, Honduras, it rains fish - now, Ogilvy Honduras is helping locals turn it into a business.

description_en: It's Coming Home is an iconic song about the failings of the England men’s football team over different generations. To mark the England Lionesses' victory at Euro 22, there was only one word that would resonate with the entire nation: home. Combining this with the world’s most iconic logo – the Nike Swoosh – created an asset that became the defining visual of the victory celebration. description_en: Less than 6% of search results show skin conditions on people of colour. And when Black and Hispanic people don’t feel seen in search results, they’re less likely to be seen by a dermatologist, leading to 25% higher mortality rates for conditions like skin cancer. description_en: In 2022, pressures were high because India hadn’t won the Cricket World Cup in 11 years. The last time India won the World Cup was in 2011, which is the same year that Oreo was launched in India. If Oreo could launch again in 2022, perhaps India could win the World Cup again in 2022.

description_en: The Goldfish Jingle took over social conversation on the night of the Grammy Awards, trending #6 worldwide. While viewers tuned in to see music’s biggest acts perform, Goldfish leveraged broadcast and live tweeting to drive a social-first provocation: create your own version of the Goldfish Jingle and share it with the world. #GoldfishJingle became an unmissable moment that took on a life of its own on TikTok, where people could leverage the sound-on environment to sing and rap their own version

From Academy Award-winner Rayka Zehtabchi and Shaandiin Tome, "Long Line of Ladies" intimately observes the months-long process of one girl, her family, and their tight-knit Karuk community as they come together to prepare for her Ihuk, the coming-of-age ceremony for girls which went dormant for over a century due to the violence and destruction brought on by the California Gold Rush.

In the weeks leading up to her Ihuk, Ahty learns traditional songs and dances and mentally and physically prepa

description_en: A dish is only as good as what it's like when it's delivered. No matter how good the chef, the ingredients, or restaurant, if it’s delivered badly, it’s ruined. In short, the delivery is a crucial ingredient in the recipe. There are many ways to ruin a dish in transit: mixed in the bag, soaked by a drink, dropped, or just late, what arrives is often a magical new creation. Deliveroo launched The One-Star Cookbook, a tongue-in-cheek collection of 36 dishes, inspired by real online one-star review
description_zh: 一道菜的好壞取決於它送到時的樣子。無論廚師多好，食材多好，餐廳多好，如果送得不好，那就毀了。簡而言之，交付是配方中的關鍵成分。毀掉的方法有很多種

description_en: In 2022, the World Cup matches started in the morning, but in Brazil, it’s illegal to run beer adverts in the morning. Since the adverts were banned, and Petra wasn’t an official sponsor of the tournament, the brand couldn’t talk about beer. So it created Petra Milk instead – a milk made with its barley, beer scent, and long necks. The drinks were available individually or in a special six-pack: three Petra Milk bottles for the morning games, and three Petra Beer bottles for the afternoon games.

description_en: Data Auction is a whimsical, bizarre, thrilling, and ultimately informative campaign. It's designed to reassert iPhone's stance on privacy by shining a light on the hidden, multibillion data industry that continues to profit off the sale of the world’s personal data. R plates stand for 'return' plates, which help other people to recognise drivers returning to the road after a traumatic road incident. description_zh: 為了強調支持那些從道路創傷中恢復的人的重要性，並幫助澳洲人更有信心地重新開車，TBWA 與 mycar 合作創建了 R 牌照。R 車牌代表「返回」車牌，可以幫助其他人

description_en:
On the Caribbean coast of Colombia there are more than 150,000 food carts that keep traditional gastronomy alive and have already become a country's heritage and symbol of identity. Thus, food trucks represent an important part of the micro-economy of the area and constitute the main source of income for more than 200,000 families.
 
In their daily activity, to prepare the typical foods they offer, such as arepas, each cart uses more than 3 liters of oil per day, which is then generally dispos

description_en: The small Belgian city of Balen tried something unprecedented to reduce the number of young people pre-drinking before they go out: handing out free drinks. Sobercoins encourage young people to arrive at the party sober by rewarding them with free drinks, based on research that shows people drink less if they arrive at a party sober. It works by giving them a breathalyser test at the entrance to the club, and rewarding them with a Sobercoin – a token for three complimentary drinks – if it comes
description_zh: 比利時小城巴倫嘗試了一項史無前例的舉措來減少年輕人外出前飲酒的數量：發放免費飲料。Sobercoins 透過獎勵免費博士來鼓勵年輕人清醒地參加聚會

description_en: Quick-service restaurant (QSR) brand Wendy’s is primarily known for its sassy brand voice, and its core differentiator: fresh, never frozen beef. To reach a younger target consumer the brand looked to where they were spending most of their time: gaming. Instead of acting like a brand to reach gamers, it acted like a gamer. Milan Design Week is a highly anticipated event that draws millions of visitors to the city each year. However, as the number of attendees has grown throughout the years, finding a comfortable and convenient dining solution between events has become increasingly difficult. In response to this problem, McDonald’s partnered with Leo Burnett Italia to create a new, design-savvy dining solution for the occasion: TableToGo.

description_zh: 百威啤酒的全球品牌平台「Greatness Is Yours to Take」幫助年輕人，尤其是嶄露頭角的音樂家追逐夢想。今年，女性和非二元音樂家被剝奪了在英國最大舞台上表現出色的機會：

Called “The Cathedral of Diablo,” the installation is part of a wider launch strategy
description_zh: 暴雪娛樂公司接管了法國的一座中世紀哥德式大教堂，並用 160 英尺長的 Rena 裝飾其天花板和牆壁，從而引發了人們對其熱門哥德式電玩遊戲系列最新作品《暗黑破壞神 IV》的期待。

description_en: To make the consequences of climate change tangible to everyone, TV 2 Denmark turned to a Danish design icon – the Copenhagen bench. TV 2 Denmark made a simple change to the design and elevated the bench by 85 centimetres to match the UN Climate Report’s estimate for the rise in sea levels by the year 2100. description_en: Lebanon is collapsing thanks to the ruling political class, which has dominated since the 1990s. Elections gave people hope, but a corrupt government tried to postpone them in a bid to maintain power. One of its excuses is the shortage of ink and paper to print ballots, so AnNahar published an Elections Edition: one that never went to print. Instead, the paper and ink from the unprinted edition was sent to the government's printing associates to print ballots. Enough was donated to cover all of
description_zh: 由於自 20 世紀 90 年代以來一直佔據主導地位的統治政治階級，黎巴嫩正在崩潰。選舉給人們帶來了希望，但腐敗的政府試圖推遲選舉以維持權力。其藉口之一是墨水和紙張短缺

description_en: Studies show that the vast majority of abusive incidents have one thing in common: a few very specific verbal insults tend to be shouted by perpetrators. Women Helping Women Asia trained its AI to recognise these key phrases in Cantonese as well as English spoken with a Cantonese accent. When they are detected, the app secretly starts recording the entire incident that follows, helping victims collect evidence against their abusers. If the AI determines the incident is escalating, an emergency a
description_zh: 研究表明，絕大多數虐待事件都有一個共同點：施暴者往往會大聲喊出一些非常具體的言語侮辱。Women Helping Women Asia 訓練其人工智慧來識別粵語和英語中的這些關鍵短語

description_en: How can we get the automotive industry to give up fossil fuels? Vattenfall and CAKE are leading the way with the first vehicle that’s truly fossil fuel-free. Nord DDB Stockholm AB launched the project by visualising one bike’s CO2 footprint as a cube that shrinks as we work towards our goal of zero emissions. description_en: Mastercard launched "WhereToStart," a digital tool to help Polish and Ukrainian businesses identify optimal locations to open shop using a complementary business data model. description_en: 33% of teens engage in sexting. 1/100 have had images shared without consent. Society often blames the victim, but Dutch telco KPN believes in a #BetterInternet. To raise awareness of online shaming and its consequences among Gen Z, we delivered our campaign as entertainment. Collaborating with singer MEAU, experts and victims we created ‘A piece of me’, a song and music video that show how forwarding without consent can ruin someone's life. With millions of shares, a top 3 hit, 100s of schools

description_en: Support in football is gender-biased. To encourage the French women’s team before the 2023 World Cup, Orange tricked the fans into loving woman’s football. We first showcased a never-seen-before compilation of top plays by French male stars (Mbappé, Giroud, Griezmann...). Then we reveal the ruse. The video was in fact a compilation of... women’s technical moves! Thanks to VFX, we faked the appearance of the French woman's team in the 1st part. The 2nd part showcases the same actions, without VFX

description_en: As housing costs rise and living space shrinks, European DIY retailer HORNBACH wants to show that there is still room for big, original ideas even in the smallest of spaces. To this end, HORNBACH shows what's possible on just one square meter – with a film set in a house where tiny rooms become stages for unlimited creativity. From a vertical dining hall to a tiny table tennis room, we prove that every centimeter holds infinite potential.

description_en: It’s true what they say, sometimes the smallest things take up the most space in your heart. This project was very near and dear to me from the moment I heard about the integral change it could bring. A big thanks to UN Women Pakistan for trusting us with the visuals and to Ali Rez at IMPACT BBDO for making us a part of this crucial message.

description_en: Bringing a whimsical magic to the festive season, the SS24 pre-collection featured a collaboration with Kyoto-based ceramic studio Suna Fujita, founded by artists Shohei Fujita and Chisato Yamano. Suna Fujita's artwork drew on imagination, childhood memories, and life with their son and pet dog to create hand-painted stories on ceramics such as teapots, cups, and plates.

description_en:
This campaign captures the longing for summer amidst the winter chill. In winter, when ice cream sales drop, we aim to remind people of that cozy feeling one gets when the sun briefly shines in the cold, even if only for a few seconds. A moment to enjoy a Magnum ice cream.

The characters: the city, the people, the cold, the elusive sun, and time itself.

A cozy, introspective love letter to ice cream, reminding us that summer is a state of mind. Summer is within. And we can find ours.
description_zh: 該活動捕捉了冬季寒冷中對夏季的渴望。在冬天，當冰淇淋銷量下降時，我們的目標是提醒人們，當陽光在寒冷中短暫照射時，即使只有幾秒鐘，人們也會有一種舒適的感覺。一刻鐘

campaign_name: The Flying Train, A Magnetic Story
description_en: Imagine the daunting roar of an MRI machine, reaching decibel levels louder than a military jet. Now, consider the impact on a child undergoing cancer treatment. Siemens Healthineers introduces "Magnetic Stories", an innovative technology transforming terrifying MRI sounds into enchanting children's audio books.
description_zh: 想像一下 MRI 機器令人生畏的轟鳴聲，其分貝水平比軍用噴射機還高。現在，考慮一下對接受癌症治療的兒童的影響。西門子醫療推出“Magnetic Stories”，一項創新技術轉型

description_en: ‘Recycle Me’ unveils a series of powerful images that depict the Coca-Cola logo after a can has been crushed during the recycling process. Learn more about Ogilvy's Advertising capabilities at Ogilvy.

description_en: Dove is spearheading the #NoDigitalDistortion movement, urging people to reject the new Bold Glamour filter. Developed by Ogilvy and DAVID, the influencer-led campaign aims to raise awareness about the harmful effects of the filter on social media users. Within just seven days, the hashtag has garnered over 365 million views, highlighting its widespread impact.
description_zh: Dove 正在帶頭髮起 #NoDigitalDistortion 運動，敦促人們拒絕新的 Bold Glamour 濾鏡。這項由影響者主導的活動由奧美和大衛發起，旨在提高人們對過濾器對美國社交媒體有害影響的認識

description_en:
Everyone should know Heineken by now. But the truth is, people don’t really know Heineken. For the past 150 years, they have been misspelling our brand, mistaking it for a German beer, calling it Hineken, Haneken, or Heneken, drinking our beer with a straw, just to name a few. 
If after 150 years this is how people enjoy Heineken, then for our 150th anniversary we made it easier for them to enjoy it. 
So we turned people’s mistakes into a global celebration. Because in the end, what matters to u
description_zh: 大家現在應該都知道喜力啤酒了。但事實是，人們並不真正了解喜力。在過去的 150 年裡，他們一直在拼錯我們的品牌，將其誤認為是德國啤酒，稱其為 Hineken、Haneken 或 Heneken，用啤酒來喝我們的啤酒。

description_en: 855-HOW-TO-QUIT-(OPIOIDS) is an innovative approach to help those struggling with opioids. It’s a helpline that turns the object of addiction into a way out, to reach out to people in the most critical moment – when they have a pill in their hand. The helpline uses the familiar opioid pill codes as phone extensions, connecting the caller with a person who managed to quit that very same pill, sharing their experiences and advice on how to quit. The initiative launched as a nationwide campaign on
description_zh: 855-HOW-TO-QUIT-(OPIOIDS) 是一種創新方法，旨在幫助那些與鴉片類藥物作鬥爭的人。這是一條幫助熱線，它將成癮的對象變成了一種出路，可以在最關鍵的時刻（當人們手中有藥丸時）向人們伸出援助之手。釷

description_en:
Fewer than 25% of Brazilians said they would watch the FIFA Women’s World Cup.
Which became a self-fulfilling problem as no open TV station bought the rights to all of the games. If there’s one thing Brazilians watch is our app. iFood is LATAM's biggest food delivery app. We did the only thing we could: we delivered our audience to the FIFA Women’s World Cup. This is iFood Audience Delivery. By partnering with the World’s Biggest football streamer, Casimiro Miguel, we broadcasted all of the FIFA
description_zh:
不到 25% 的巴西人表示會觀看 FIFA 女足世界盃。
這成為一個自我實現的問題，因為沒有一家開放電視台購買了所有遊戲的版權。如果說巴西人最重視的一件事就是我們的應用程式。iFood 是拉丁美洲的大事

description_en:
Seventeen independent creatives, artists and filmmakers came together in 2023 to create the emotionally colourful tapestry of 25 looping scenes depicting life in modern Britain for Channel 4’s bold brand transformation. 

Drawing on the concept of the ‘4’ as a traveller through the truths of the nation, the creative agency interpreted five themes - identity, the land, system, release and love. 

Viewers dive through the changing idents inside the number four, indulging in live-action, animation
description_zh:

description_en: Filter Caps is a solution for the world's water crisis; it transforms the cap of a PET bottle into a complete water filtration station. This groundbreaking invention offers an accessible and portable way to purify water, making it especially useful in areas where clean water is scarce or unavailable. By simply attaching the Filter Cap to a standard PET bottle, users can have access to safe drinking water, thus reducing the risk of waterborne diseases and improving overall health and well-being i
description_zh: 過濾蓋是解決世界水危機的一個方案；它將 PET 瓶蓋轉變為完整的水過濾站。這項突破性的發明提供了一種易於攜帶的淨化水的方法，使其在工業領域特別有用。

description_en:
In the years since Tide launched PODS, washing machines have increased 80%. Which means loads are bigger and dirtier, yet consumers are still dosing the same amount. So in 2023, Tide launched Power PODS with 85% more cleaning power – the only problem was no one thought they needed them.

So in an effort to show consumers the very real need for Tide Power PODS, we opted to use their own videos as evidence. We scoured the internet for the most viral UGC clips and then inserted actor / meme star Ku
description_zh: 自從汰漬推出 PODS 以來，洗衣機數量增加了 80%。這意味著負載更大、更髒，但消費者的用量仍然相同。因此，2023 年，汰漬推出了 Power PODS，清潔力提高了 85%——唯一的問題

'If you’re into it, it’s in the V&A’ was a highly targeted campaign that heroed the breadth of the museum’s collection. We worked with curators to showcase 70 different objects across out of home, press, digital and social media, reaching the general public and the most passionate of collectors alike.

Then we got crafty. From book-binding to gaming to metal-detecting, we produced a series of stunts and hid them across the UK for enthusiasts to stumble across. 

And we roped in the public. We re
description_zh: 「如果你喜歡它，它就在 V&A 裡」是一項針對性很強的宣傳活動，擴大了博物館藏品的廣度。我們與策展人合作，在戶外、媒體、數位和社群媒體上展示 70 種不同的物品，吸引了大眾

description_en: Heinz is the world’s most beloved ketchup. It’s a thick, rich, delicious sauce of unmatched quality, making it the only brand that is truly synonymous with the red condiment. When the brand discovered that there are restaurants around the world that refill Heinz bottles with inferior ketchup, it didn’t take offence, because these restaurants are just showing that they know what everybody else knows: it has to be Heinz. To bring attention to this real behaviour, Heinz launched the Ketchup Fraud c

As you watch, it's easy to overlook that it's a music video as the track seamlessly intertwines with the visuals in an unconventional yet perfect manner. This isn't just the Spotify version; they've elevated it to another level. The track from the Jungle album serves as an ode to rave culture, music festivals, and freedom. Back in school after the holidays, Liam recounts his transfo
description_zh: Blaze 的《MADLY》是一部真正的詩作；它的音樂錄影帶就像是長片中的場景。當您觀看時，很容易忽略這是一部音樂視頻，因為曲目以非傳統的方式與視覺效果無縫地交織在一起。

The intertwined octopi represent a symbiotic relationship where ideas flow freely, inspiring ambition and pushing boundaries.

description_en:
In Brazil, 911 emergency service take an average of 38 minutes to arrive at the location of an occurrence. In this reality, many Brazilians look for information and help about first aid on the internet. This is why the No Ad Project is so relevant, because it promotes first aid education where people look for information about first aid when experiencing an emergency: on first aid channels.
This initiative removes ads before videos that teaches first aid techniques. It streamlines access to info

description_en: To celebrate World Down Syndrome Day, adidas collaborated with creative agency FCB Canada and director Jason Van Bruggen to tell the story of adidas’ first sponsored athlete with Down Syndrome, Chris Nikic. As Chris is a triathlete, marathon runner and the world’s first Ironman with Down Syndrome, the campaign reserved the runner BIB 321 for Chris to race with in the Boston Marathon - with extended plans to allow all neurodivergent athletes to wear BIB 321 in future events too.

description_en:
In Thailand, name confusion is a big common problem. 
Sammakorn, the housing developer was unlucky that its name is similar to the revenue department. People often confuse Sammakorn with Sanpakorn. 
People messaged Sammakorn's social media asking about tax filing, even their employees were confused with the tax collector. 

To address this issue, Sammakorn create self-mocking campaign starting with film asking for sympathy and reminding them that Sammakorn sells houses. And, because name confusi
description_zh:
在泰國，名字混淆是一個很大的常見問題。
房地產開發商 Sammakorn 不幸的是，它的名字與稅務部門相似。人們經常將 Sammakorn 與 Sanpakorn 混淆。
人們在 Sammakorn 的社交媒體上留言詢問 abo

description_en:
Impulse is an Artificial Intelligence app for Galaxy Watch that helps around 100M people worldwide with speech disorders and stuttering. Through an algorithm based on Natural Language Processing, it analyzes and translates words into rhythmic vibrations allowing users to have an invisible and inaudible assistant on their wrist, which helps to synchronize the brain with the speech.

This multifunction app helps users in many situations through Voice assistance, AI speech coach and Rhythm & Tone
description_zh: Impulse 是一款適用於 Galaxy Watch 的人工智慧應用程序，可幫助全球約 1 億患有語言障礙和口吃的人。透過基於自然語言處理的演算法，它分析單字並將其翻譯成有節奏的顫音

description_en:
Black Friday week in Brazil breaks sales records.
However, we noticed that in 2022, the weeks after Black Friday were the worst for Samsung.com sales.

So, how could the company compensate for it in a fast and simple way?

We discovered that 80% of online shoppers abandon their shopping carts, and many do so intentionally to receive further discounts. We leveraged this behavior and offered them "Throw Back Deals" from 2 years ago: the latest product models at the price of old ones.
description_zh:
巴西的黑色星期五週打破了銷售記錄。
然而，我們注意到，2022 年黑色星期五之後的幾週是 Samsung.com 銷售最差的時期。

那麼，公司如何以快速、簡單的方式進行補償呢？

我們發現 80% 的人

description_en:
Can we say SHT? Well we just did!
 
Edelman Canada's award-winning IKEA SHT campaign sparked a national discussion around circularity and sustainability, shining a spotlight on the issue of double taxation on second-hand items across the country.

愛德曼加拿大公司屢獲殊榮的宜家 SHT 活動引發了關於循環性和可持續發展的全國性討論，凸顯了全國範圍內對二手物品的雙重徵稅問題。

description_zh: 「感謝可口可樂的創作」慶祝可口可樂標誌性視覺形象的自發性品牌重塑。它展示了對世界各地酒窖中斯賓塞標誌、調色板、輪廓瓶和波浪的重新詮釋。我們有數百個版本

Amidst the euphoria, one question consumed the minds of the people: When would the coveted trophy arrive in the country, igniting nationwide celebrations?

description_en: In 2022, pressures were high because India hadn’t won the Cricket World Cup in 11 years. Oreo’s global motto is to bring people together by sparking playful connections – and it turns out there was a playful connection between India's cricket team and the brand itself. The last time India won the World Cup was in 2011, which is the same year that Oreo was launched in India. If Oreo could launch again in 2022, perhaps India could win the World Cup again in 2022.

description_en:
Health inequalities can’t be ignored, contributing to millions of early deaths in England alone for historically marginalised groups.

Medical technologies play a part in these failings, with devices such as common pulse oximeters, reported to take inaccurate, life threatening, readings from people with darker skin.

As the UKs life science industry grows, our opportunity to reduce inequalities and provide a more inclusive future is huge and one Ear Switch set out to tackle.

In 48 hours we created Ja'marr a clothing line with his comments. It included a gold chain of our logo. We launched on social and built a site to sell it.

description_en: When Glenn was 15 years old, he made one nude with his phone. But when this photo ended up online, he took his own life. description_en:
Peru, just as many Latin-American countries, is a very unequal country and with very limited health resources. People of low income, which represent the majority of the population, cannot access private health care and must relay on a dilapidated public health care system. On top of that, people outside the Capital is forced to travel to Lima to gain access to Cancer treatments.
Cancer is a combatible disease if treated in time. The Peruvian Cancer Foundation has been carrying out an annual fund

description_en: Oatly learned that the city of Paris only accepts murals from brands if they are ‘artistically’ made and don’t feature products or company logos. So, by complying with the rules but placing objects with  products in anamorphic perspectives painted on them in front of the murals, the illusion of walls with products on them appeared as pedestrians passing by ended up in the right angle.

description_en: Every second of social media generates carbon emissions. But every second of reading doesn’t. That’s why we launched the Offset Boxset - designed to show how every second of reading can save the planet. For instance, if you spend 14 hours on social media, you generate 1 kilo of co2eq. Our 1-kilo boxset, had books with the exact reading time required to reduce it. People could choose to reduce 1,2,3 or 4 kilos of co2eq. description_zh: 社群媒體的每一秒都會產生碳排放。但閱讀的每一秒卻並非如此。這就是我們推出 Offset Boxset 的原因 - 旨在展示每一秒的閱讀如何拯救地球。例如，如果您在社交媒體上花費 14 小時

The Kanazawa High School Sumo Tournament is the ultimate stage for high school sumo in Japan. In its first post-COVID edition with spectators, it became essential to convey the allure of on-site spectating to the local residents.

As it is a summit showdown, we symbolically likened the pairing of wrestlers to "grand mountains." Monochrome photographs capturing swirling dust were used to create a sense of tension, and close-up shots, looking up at the wrestlers, authentically reproduced the uniqu

campaign_name: Rights Against The Right, The First Trademark That Stops Trading Nazi Merch
description_en: Where lawmakers have been incapable of acting with bans, we found a way for our client, the NGO Noise against Nazis, to stop the spread of Nazi codes for the first time ever: a legal hack using trademark law. We secured trademark rights for German and international Nazi codes at the European trademark office. As the new rightful owners of these trademarks, we can now bring Nazi shops to justice: By compelling them to remove and destroy the merch bearing these codes and claiming compensation for
description_zh: 在立法者無法採取禁令的情況下，我們為我們的客戶（非政府組織「反納粹噪音」）找到了一種方法，有史以來第一次阻止納粹代碼的傳播：利用商標法進行合法駭客攻擊。我們獲得了德國的商標權

description_en: The kombi is an icon for progressiveness, driven by those who believed in a better world. But it’s still a petrol vehicle. description_en: People think they know what ‘suicidal’ looks like: crying, anger, despair. In the absence of these signs, nobody intervenes. description_zh: 人們認為他們知道「自殺」是什麼樣的：哭泣、憤怒、絕望。如果沒有這些跡象，就沒有人幹預。每週有 125 人自殺，長期合作夥伴反對悲慘生活運動 (CALM) 和英國獨立電視台 (ITV)

"Capa vs War” was born from the observation that images captured in the first half of the 20th century by war photographer and photojournalist, Robert Capa, could be mistaken as photos of ongoing armed conflicts.

By curating a selection that better showcases this visual ambiguity, the campaign uses pictures and headlines to question and provoke a comparison between our present, and mankind’s violent past of global scale conflicts. With this correlation, we crafted a message that voices a demand

description_zh:

description_en: iPhone users are the most reluctant audience segment to try Galaxy, even with a disruptive & innovative form factor such as the Galaxy Z Fold. description_zh: iPhone 用戶是最不願意嘗試 Galaxy 的受眾群體，即使 Galaxy Z Fold 具有顛覆性和創新的外形。在線上觀看簡報並不能真正體現 Fold 的沉浸式優勢，也無法讓 iPhone 用戶嘗試

description_en: "Under My Skin" addresses the cultural issue of bullying, which creates scars and long-term impact on millions of children throughout generations – an issue which remains normalised and unacknowledged. description_en: “The Waiting Room” sparked a global debate about health data privacy by highlighting the importance of keeping health data private on your phone. In the film, An all-knowing villain gleefully overshares people's most personal data as they wait in a doctor’s office waiting room. The campaign earned global coverage in 100+ publications and 326 million global views allowing Apple to restate its commitment to data privacy when and where it matters most.

description_en: The typography industry is a USD 13 Million industry where illegal downloads and usage of fonts deprive typographers of valuable income. description_en: To mark 20 years of advocating for Real Beauty, Dove launched a campaign addressing a new threat to authentic representation: the influence of AI-generated imagery. Recognizing that standard AI prompts often produce idealized, unrealistic beauty norms, Dove saw an opportunity to shift how beauty is reflected in digital environments.

description_en: Indian Railways loses over $800 million annually due to fare evasion, a long-standing issue worsened by poor incentives and low morale among law-abiding passengers. While massive fines and checks target violators, honest travelers are left unrewarded. With over 23 million daily passengers and an already strained system, the Indian Railway’s challenge isn’t just enforcement—it’s how to build a culture of integrity in a population where rule-following often goes unnoticed or unappreciated. The Luc
description_zh: 印度鐵路每年因逃票而損失超過 8 億美元，這一長期存在的問題因缺乏激勵措施和守法乘客士氣低落而變得更加惡化。雖然對違規者處以巨額罰款和檢查，但誠實的旅行者卻不會得到任何獎勵

description_en: German discount grocer Penny has launched the innovative "Price Packs" campaign to emphasize its commitment to affordability in a highly competitive market dominated by Aldi and Lidl. The initiative involves printing the prices of selected own-brand products directly on their packaging to reinforce the perception of consistently low prices. By doing so, Penny aims to build trust with shoppers and distinguish itself as a reliable source for affordable groceries during the ongoing cost of living c
description_zh: 德國折扣雜貨商 Penny 推出了創新的「Price Packs」活動，以強調其在 Aldi 和 Lidl 主導的競爭激烈的市場中對負擔能力的承諾。此舉措涉及列印選定自有品牌的價格

For nearly as long as websites have existed, there has been Squarespace. We have been woven into the fabric of the internet since its early days, playing a defining role in shaping how people bring their businesses to life online.

For Squarespace’s 11th Super Bowl campaign, we imagined a timeless origin story set in a bygone era, where websites are delivered door-to-door like newspapers, by the one and only Barry Keoghan. Barry Keoghan delivered the good word of websites across the land, spinni
description_zh:

description_en:
A MEMBERSHIP SO GOOD, IT MADE THE ADULTS JEALOUS

We positioned Uber One for Students as “a membership so good, everybody wants to be a student.” 

So instead of casting a Gen Z spokesperson, we made our case with a 78-year-old brand ambassador: Brian Cox. A far cry from a fresh-faced influencer, Brian reframed Uber’s student membership as so desirable, it was worth returning to college just to reap the benefits. Brian’s fame for playing a curmudgeonly billionaire lent the scenario a pitch-perfe
description_zh:

因此，我們沒有選擇 Z 世代代言人，而是選擇了 78 歲的品牌大使：Bria

description_en: For the first time ever, a brand turned in-game audio commentary into a new media channel. Utilizing a loophole in the FC25 in-game commentary audio update, we outsmarted the newest technology to de-position our competition who spent millions of dollars on traditional media sponsorship buys. Capitalizing on a massive audience that we need to engage within a moment that we had their full attention, we tricked the dynamic in-game commentary technology of FC25 to say our brand name ‘Burger’ ‘King’
description_zh: 有史以來第一次，一個品牌將遊戲內的音訊評論變成了一個新的媒體管道。利用FC25遊戲內解說音訊更新的漏洞，我們智取最新技術，擊敗了花費數百萬玩偶的競爭對手

description_en: With 7 in 10 Brits targeted by scammers, O2 decided to fight back, attacking their most valuable resource: time. Enter Daisy, the AI granny designed to waste fraudsters' time so they can’t scam real people. Trained on real scammer data, our AI pensioner kept scammers on the line for 40+ minutes with endless chatter about her hobbies, family and cat, Fluffy. Daisy became a social media sensation, her shocking yet amusing interactions raising awareness while reclaiming O2's customer-focused reputa
description_zh: 由於十分之七的英國人成為詐騙者的目標，O2 決定反擊，攻擊他們最寶貴的資源：時間。Daisy 登場了，這個人工智慧奶奶的設計目的是為了浪費詐騙者的時間，讓他們無法欺騙真人。我們的 AI pensio 經過真實詐騙者資料的訓練

description_zh: Axa 是健康保险领域的世界领先者。作為最早為心理健康風險提供保險的公司之一以及全球心理健康指數的創建者，安盛目前正在將其重點從保險擴展到預防。為了覆蓋更廣泛的受眾，Axa 創建了

Every new drop of Lidl-branded items is a hit, with people going wild at each release, showing love for the brand and its colors. This year, we wanted another banger, but as we are a brand for the people, we gave the power back to them.

How? With Lidlize, an AI created by BRIA, transforming any object into a Lidl one, using just a few words. 
A simple promise : the most liked product would be produced and sold for real. 

More than a million people played with Lidl brand asset, + 2.000.000 prod

brand: Kernel, Ministry Of Foreign Affairs Of Ukraine
description_en:
53% of Ukraine’s economy depends on food and agricultural exports. Today, landmines occupy 30% of our land. Without global assistance, it will take decades to make it safe. 

The Minefields Honey Project - the magic mix of nature and tech helps us to create a product that never meant to exist by turning unsafe areas into flourishing gardens for symbolic honey making.

Personnel limited edition jars with details about our issue became a diplomatic tool and were given directly to influential peopl

description_en:

description_en: Japan is the only country with a law requiring married couples to share the same surname, with 95% of women adopting their husband's name. description_en:
Brazil's biggest cultural event, Carnival, brings nonstop partying, costumes, glitter, makeup, and very few pockets for smartphones and credit cards. Still, it generates nearly $2.5 billion in transactions in 2025 alone.

What if Mastercard could provide a payment method that allowed people to celebrate and express themselves freely and safely?

"Mastercard Makeup Payment. Cultural expression as a payment method. That’s priceless."

description_en: OREO changed its recipe, with more cocoa and less sugar, making it tastier than ever. Convincing people to try the new flavour was a challenge. So, we teamed up with one of the biggest cinema hits of the year, A MINECRAFT MOVIE, to create an unmissable tasting experience. In MINECRAFT, nothing is round, so fans had to bite the new OREO into a square, taste the new recipe, and scan it to enter an AR game. After anticipated popular demand, we designed and launched a Limited Edition Square Cookie.
description_zh: 奧利奧改變了配方，加入更多的可可和更少的糖，使其比以往更美味。說服人們嘗試新口味是一個挑戰。因此，我們與今年最熱門的電影之一《我的世界電影》合作，打造了一部不容錯過的作品

description_en:
The murder trial of Kazakhstan’s former government minister, who killed his wife Saltanat Nukenova, gained global attention. Saltanat’s name became a symbol of the fight against domestic violence. Soon after, Parliament passed the Law criminalizing domestic abuse. People called it ‘Saltanat’s Law’. 

But as public focus faded, the violence continued… In 2024 alone, police received more than 100,000 reports of family abuse across Kazakhstan. Yet people do not realize how often domestic violence
description_zh: 哈薩克前政府部長殺害其妻子薩爾塔納特·努科諾娃的謀殺案審判引起了全球關注。薩爾塔納特的名字成為反對家庭暴力的象徵。不久之後，議會通過了一項法律，將 d

description_en:
Black Friday week in Brazil breaks sales records.
However, we noticed that in 2022, the weeks after Black Friday were the worst for Samsung.com sales.

So, how could the company compensate for it in a fast and simple way?

We discovered that 80% of online shoppers abandon their shopping carts, and many do so intentionally to receive further discounts. We leveraged this behavior and offered them "Throw Back Deals" from 2 years ago: the latest product models at the price of old ones.
description_zh:
巴西的黑色星期五週打破了銷售記錄。
然而，我們注意到，2022 年黑色星期五之後的幾週是 Samsung.com 銷售最差的時期。

那麼，公司如何以快速、簡單的方式進行補償呢？

我們發現 80% 的人

description_en:
For decades, Pelotica de Goma, a simplified version of baseball, was the most popular street game in Venezuela. It was where future MLB legends took their first swings. But due to years of political, economic, and social crisis, the streets became unsafe, and the game slowly disappeared from the lives of new generations.

In 2023, Vacílate Esto, a Venezuelan entertainment brand and podcast, partnered with creative teams to bring the game back. They launched Pelotica de Goma: The Official Leagu
description_zh: 幾十年來，Pelotica de Goma（棒球的簡化版）一直是委內瑞拉最受歡迎的街頭運動。這裡是未來美國職棒大聯盟 (MLB) 傳奇人物的第一次揮桿之地。但由於多年的政治、經濟和社會危機，街道變得不那麼整潔。

description_en:
While Paris’s top museums like the Louvre, Orsay, or Versailles attract all the attention, their masterpieces unknowingly advertise the treasures of another overlooked museum: the Musée de l’Armée—like Napoleon’s hat from a Louvre portrait.

By revealing these hidden connections, we turned their masterpieces into direct invitations to our museum.

The campaign was strategically deployed in high-traffic areas: near these museums, in metro stations surrounding them, in their queues, and even insid
description_zh:
雖然羅浮宮、奧賽宮或凡爾賽宮等巴黎頂級博物館吸引了所有人的注意力，但它們的傑作卻在不知不覺中宣傳了另一個被忽視的博物館的寶藏：軍事博物館，就像盧浮宮肖像畫中拿破崙的帽子一樣。

通過雷韋亞

description_en: Ogilvy Colombia and Nestlé Central America present a ground breaking innovation — packaging made from cheese whey. Learn more about Ogilvy's Advertising capabilities at Ogilvy.

description_en:
Apple has long believed in music’s ability to re-shape our emotional landscape. In this film Pedro Pascal is engulfed in the solitude of winter, in the aftermath of a breakup. With a tap of Active Noise Cancellation on AirPods 4, his world changes & he finds peace & the power to move on through the power of music.

With choreography, the city pulses with synchronized movement, strangers become dancers who begin blending seamlessly into the otherworldly backdrop. All to show how music—along with
description_zh: 蘋果公司長期以來一直相信音樂能夠重塑我們的情感景觀。在這部電影中，佩德羅·帕斯卡在分手後陷入了冬天的孤獨之中。只要輕按 AirPods 4 上的主動降噪功能，他的世界就會改變

description_en:
The Athletes Code is a groundbreaking, legally binding provision embedded in every Powerade athlete sponsorship contract, protecting their right to pause their career and commitments without the risk of losing their sponsorship. To develop this provision, we partnered with athletes, The IOC (Olympics), mental health advocates, and legal experts to craft a protection that truly empowers athletes.

We extended new contracts to all Powerade athletes worldwide to include The Athletes Code. 
The Athl
description_zh: 《運動員守則》是一項開創性的、具有法律約束力的條款，嵌入在每份 Powerade 運動員贊助合約中，保護他們暫停職業生涯和承諾的權利，而不會有失去贊助的風險。為制定本規定

description_en:
Online Comment Sections are fuelling division in an already divided world. But in reality, around a lamb BBQ, Aussies aren’t as divided as it seems online. 

So, Australian Lamb launched a campaign to get people ‘out of the comments and into the cutlets’ with a script made from 100% real Aussie comments - sourced from the most divisive topics of the year. The film held up a mirror to the nation and showed us how ridiculous our online behaviour had become. 

To drive views we turned divisive comm
description_zh:
線上評論部分正在加劇本已分裂的世界的分裂。但實際上，圍繞著羊肉燒烤，澳洲人並不像網路上看起來的那麼分裂。

因此，澳洲羔羊發起了一項活動，讓人們「遠離評論，進入討論區」。

description_en:
EDF produces a 97,8% carbon free electricity, it was naturally chosen to be the official renewable electricity supplier to Paris 2024. To help the Games halve its carbon footprint, EDF reinvented the Olympic Cauldron.
Convinced that electricity is the only solution to move towards a CO2-neutral world, EDF invented a 100% electric flame for the Cauldron of Paris 2024.
Revealed to the world during the opening ceremony, the Cauldron stayed in the Tuileries Garden to create an exclusive customer exp
description_zh:

description_en: The Mind Guardian is the first clinically validated AI video game able to detect early signs of Alzheimer’s and other neurological diseases with 97% accuracy - available on not only Samsung’s, but any Android tablet. It revolutionizes cognitive testing via an immersive POV game: while players explore an open-world city inspired by their minds, with everyday life scenarios and challenges, an AI analyzes all decisions and actions in real time, translating them into data about their cognitive healt
description_zh: Mind Guardian 是首款經過臨床驗證的 AI 電玩遊戲，能夠以 97% 的準確率檢測阿茲海默症和其他神經系統疾病的早期症狀 - 不僅適用於三星，還適用於任何 Android 平板電腦。它徹底改變了認知測試

description_en:
Marijuana is legal in much of the U.S., creating a multi-billion-dollar industry. Yet thousands remain incarcerated for non-violent marijuana offenses. In many cases, release requires only a signature from an elected official.

To highlight this disparity, we created The Pen to Right History—a non-partisan symbol built from real stories of incarceration, clemency pleas, and public calls for reform. Each pen was designed to write letters to the lawmakers with the power to grant pardons—using th
description_zh:

為了突出這個迪

description_en:
Based on a common behavior we observed in supermarkets, specifically around Oreo shelves, we created a campaign that highlights real decisions people make when giving in to a craving. The goal was to make visible something that already happens naturally: someone choosing Oreo and leaving another product out of place.

One of the biggest creative challenges was making sure the pieces felt completely authentic. That’s the core of the idea: nothing staged, nothing retouched, nothing forced. We ai
description_zh: 根據我們在超市（特別是奧利奧貨架周圍）觀察到的常見行為，我們發起了一場活動，強調人們在屈服於渴望時做出的真實決定。目標是讓自然已經發生的事情變得可見

description_en: MSI Reproductive Choices wanted to help American women preserve their right to make their own medical decisions as much as possible and to drive donations that would help further their efforts to make reproductive choice available for all.

description_en:
“18 Months” is a stop-motion short film born out of love.

Created in partnership with Klick Health and Second Nurture, it tells the powerful true story of Pete and Dan — a gay couple who found an abandoned baby in a New York subway and spent the next 18 months fighting to legally adopt him.

Told without stereotypes and with deep emotional nuance, the 6-minute film blends handcrafted puppetry with real-time projection techniques to bring this journey to life. At its heart, “18 Months” is a stor
description_zh:
《18個月》是一部因愛而生的定格動畫短片。

該劇與 Klick Health 和 Second Nurture 合作製作，講述了皮特和丹的真實故事——一對同性戀夫婦在紐約地鐵裡發現了一個被遺棄的嬰兒，並度過了接下來的時光。

Collaborating with singer MEAU, experts and victims we created ‘A piece of me’, a song and music video that show how forwarding without consent can ruin someone's life. With millions of shares, a top 3 hit, 100s of schools

I built an idea out that told the stories of two amazing figures, Terence Crawford and Israel Madrimov, through the inverted and sometimes positive protrusions of a corner. description_en: 1 in 3 truck drivers has compromised vision, leading to over 25,000 crashes and over 10,000 deaths. These drivers are from lower income groups and find clinical communication intimidating. We identified Dhabas (highway eateries) as the perfect intervention point to change their behaviour. We replaced the regular menus with our eye test menu. These were designed in consultation with optometrists using designs inspired from Indian truck art, making the tests less intimidating to the truckers. When
description_zh: 三分之一的卡車司機視力受損，造成超過 25,000 起車禍和 10,000 多人死亡。這些司機來自低收入群體，他們覺得臨床溝通令人生畏。我們認為 Dhabas（高速公路餐廳）是完美的選擇

description_en: While milk is a “must have” on US breakfast tables, plant-based beverages are a “nice to have.” To break the dairy default and get Gen Z and Millennials’ attention we turned to a TikTok star. “Famous for turning any phrase into a lyric—and any lyric into an ear-worm” we knew he could turn Silk’s lawyer-approved RTBs into reasons to sing along and pay attention. description_en:
In Mexico gender-based violence is a structural crisis with 10 women murdered daily, one a minor. Girls, in particular, are in an extremely vulnerable position. Simply because they are female, they are twice as likely to experience violence as boys.

The idea tells the story of a girl who, in order to escape daily violence and harassment, decides to disguise herself as a boy. This decision reflects a harsh reality in Mexico, where girls are twice as likely to experience violence compared to bo
description_zh: 在墨西哥，基於性別的暴力是一場結構性危機，每天有 10 名婦女被謀殺，其中一名婦女未成年。尤其是女孩，處於極其脆弱的地位。僅僅因為她們是女性，她們遭受暴力的可能性是男孩的兩倍。

description_en: 6 out of 10 girls fear playing sport due fear of period stains. At the same time, the female athletes they look up to don’t want to be reduced to their periods - the reality is, they play through stains of all kinds, including blood, every single day.  For women in sport, period stains are an inevitable part of the game, just like grass, mud, sweat, and other blood stains. And yet, there’s a double standard for blood stains - they mean different things depending on where they are. Period stains
description_zh: 十分之六的女孩因為害怕經期污漬而害怕運動。同時，她們所仰慕的女運動員並不想被降格為經期——現實是，她們每天都要經歷各種污漬，包括血跡。

description_en: Football Lover FM was created by So Foot to tackle the yearly challenge of Valentine’s Day, a low point for football media in terms of traffic, audience, and viewership. Fans are torn between celebrating February 14th and watching the game. So Foot turned this challenge into an opportunity by launching a radio station that transformed live football commentary into romantic love songs, blending sport and romance. description_en: We turned 2024’s most viral social moment into a culture-shaping brand play, redefining Four Seasons for the social-first era. As Four Seasons’ Global Social AOR, we set out to break luxury free from slow-moving norms and make it fresh, relevant, and culturally in tune. When a TikTok of a baby reacting to “Who wants to go to the Four Seasons Orlando?” took off, we moved fast. In just 7 days, we made the baby the world’s youngest luxury brand ambassador and reintroduced Four Seasons on TikTok. Us

In September 2023, Taylor Swift’s romance with NFL player Travis Kelce took over the internet. Swifties became enthralled with their relationship. When one Twitter account shared, "Taylor Swift was eating a piece of chicken with ketchup and seemingly ranch!" the post exploded.

"History Outnumbered" is a powerful campaign by Dentsu Creative Iberia for The History Channel, marking both the 80th anniversary of the Holocaust and the 25th anniversary of the channel itself. 

In response to the troubling resurgence of far-right extremism, the campaign delivers a stark warning: if we don’t learn from history, we are doomed to repeat it. Tattooed numbers from the arms of Holocaust survivors are used to visualize frightening data, such as –

33,963 Racial Hate Crimes in Ge

The world's first interface that allows bedridden people to become players.

By connecting these tools to virtual avatars and games, we have successfully created new forms of embodiment and communication.
Players using these tools have been able to share experiences and communicate seamlessly with non-disabled individuals through gaming, without any barriers.

It all begins with a juice stain on his uniform, the result of a push in the cafeteria. As the days go by, the stain takes on a life of its own, transforming into a shadowy monster that feeds on the laughter of other students,
description_zh: 研究表明，細微的跡象（例如製服上的污漬）可能表明存在霸凌行為。身為處理頑固污漬的專家，Vanish 不能忽視這些問題。為了解決這個問題，我們推出了一部短片，講述了一個小男孩經歷的故事

description_en: For many young people living in Brazil's favelas, the first gift they receive in life is a firearm. It is not a soccer ball. It's not a doll. It is a gun. This is the story of Jovem MK, a new Brazilian rapper who was about to release her debut album titled Meu Karma, inspired by her life story. To launch the album Meu Karma, we decided to go beyond a simple music video for a single. We transformed her life story into a powerful musical short film for the entire album, highlighting the rise and r
description_zh: 對於許多生活在巴西貧民窟的年輕人來說，他們人生中收到的第一份禮物就是槍枝。這不是一個足球。這不是一個娃娃。這是一把槍。這是巴西新饒舌歌手 Jovem MK 的故事，她即將發行首張專輯

campaign_name: Kendrick Lamar Super Bowl Halftime Show Campaign
Letting Our Gen-Z Staff Write The Marketing Script

description_en: Omnicom Group is the world's leading marketing and sales company, offering advertising, media, PR, and digital commerce.
description_zh: 宏盟集團是全球領先的行銷和銷售公司，提供廣告、媒體、公關和數位商務服務。

description_en:
Ten years ago, McDonald’s made a mistake: they took the McRib off the menu. So to bring it back, we made one little mistake.
 
We “mistakenly” sent a test notification to our biggest McRib fans, identified by their preference for BBQ sauce in our app. Using data in this way helped us capture a targeted audience.
 
This little “mistake” became the number 1 trending topic on X and achieved £350 million worth of earned media, along with an 850% increase in conversation. We sold over 500,000 McRibs
description_zh:
十年前，麥當勞犯了一個錯誤：他們把 McRib 從菜單上刪除了。為了把它帶回來，我們犯了一個小錯誤。

我們「錯誤地」向我們最大的 McRib 粉絲發送了測試通知，根據他們在我們的應用程式中對燒烤醬的偏好來識別

description_en: We used the hundreds of unused spaces to share all of the Marina Prieto’s 54 Instagram Posts. The entire Metro was filled with her: going for a walk, sunbathing in the garden or taking a nap. Just her photos: not a single logo nor CTA inviting to follow her. We just waited. And it was such a success that within a few hours, social media was flooded with this question: Who is Marina Prieto and why is she everywhere? Then, after weeks of expectation, we revealed the big mystery at the Spanish Effi
description_zh: 我們利用數百個未使用的空間來分享 Marina Prieto 的所有 54 個 Instagram 貼文。整個地鐵裡都擠滿了她：散步、在花園裡曬日光浴、或是小憩。只有她的照片：沒有任何徽標或 CTA 邀請關注

description_en:
Unrealistic beauty standards and toxic trends are teaching girls to hate their bodies. And it’s not just harming them now: it’s harming their futures. 2 in 3 girls stop participating in school because they hate their appearance. As a champion of self-esteem, Dove had to act. 


Most Likely To is a campaign that tells five girls’ true stories of how low confidence has tragically impacted their participation at school. The campaign drove viewers to Dove’s Confidence Classes, a series of six academ
description_zh: 不切實際的美容標準和有毒的趨勢正在教導女孩們討厭自己的身體。這不僅傷害了他們現在：也傷害了他們的未來。三分之二的女孩因為討厭自己的外表而不再上學。作为自我的冠军

description_en:
Through a combination of social listening and qualitative research, we discovered a fascinating fact: 99% of people eat Cheetos with their dominant hand.

For most brands, this wouldn’t mean much. But for Cheetos — which covers your fingers in the brand’s iconic orange dust — it means that they’re forced to do everything else with their non-dominant hand.

As part of a fully-integrated campaign, we launched a limited-edition bag that was fully developed with the designer’s “Other Hand.”
description_zh:
透過社交聆聽和質性研究的結合，我們發現了一個令人著迷的事實：99% 的人用慣用手吃奇多。

對大多數品牌來說，這意義不大。但對奇多來說——它會在你的手指上蓋住

description_en:
To launch the Galaxy S24 Ultra, we created an unboxing experience as exciting as the tech inside it.    

We took a trip back to 1938, to the South Korean city of Daegu, where Samsung first opened as a grocery store. Inspired by the brand's origins, we sent influencers and tech reviewers Samsung's newest tech disguised as Korean grocery items.  

Importantly, the entire experience was written in Korean – meaning influencers needed to use Samsung’s new AI-powered translator to make sense of the e
description_zh:
為了推出 Galaxy S24 Ultra，我們創造了一種與內部技術一樣令人興奮的開箱體驗。

我們回到 1938 年的韓國大邱市，三星在那裡首次開設雜貨店。受到品牌起源的啟發，

campaign_name: Reshaping Rugby: The World’S First Tiktok Final
description_en:
When Super Rugby Aupiki, NZ’s premier women’s rugby competition, faced cancellation, principal sponsor 2degrees didn’t just save it - they transformed it. Partnering, Sky Sport, and TikTok, 2degrees pioneered the world’s first live sports broadcast shot, produced, and aired entirely in vertical format for mobile viewing. 

This innovation brought the biggest game in NZ women’s rugby to a new legion of fans nationwide, integrating TikTok features like live polls and real-time comments for unmatch
description_zh: 當紐西蘭頂級女子橄欖球比賽 Super Rugby Aupiki 面臨取消時，主要贊助商 2 Degrees 不僅拯救了它，還改變了它。2 Degrees 與天空體育 (Sky Sport) 和 TikTok 合作，開創了世界上第一個體育直播節目

description_en: Creativity is key to development, but a study with the Ad Council Research Institute found parents struggle to prioritize it. So, Crayola launched a movement to highlight its importance—by reuniting adults with their own childhood creativity. Fueled by America’s love for solving mysteries, we invited people to respond to the call to track down the original creators of decades-old childhood art from Crayola’s archives. Through participation far and wide on a mix of channels, we inspired adults to
description_zh: 創造力是發展的關鍵，但廣告委員會研究所的一項研究發現，父母很難優先考慮創造力。因此，繪兒樂發起了一項運動，透過讓成年人與自己的童年創造力重新結合起來，來強調其重要性。加油

description_en:
Gun related child deaths in the U.S. are 29 times higher than in other developed nations. The U.S. seems unable to save its children from gun violence, so we turned our plea to other countries: Save American children from the USA. Adopt an American child.
For the first time an anti-gun campaign aired beyond the U.S. border, asking foreigners to adopt American children and take them back to their safe countries. The campaign aired in 7 languages across several media, all of which directed people
description_zh: 美國與槍枝相關的兒童死亡人數比其他已開發國家高 29 倍。美國似乎無法將其兒童從槍支暴力中拯救出來，因此我們向其他國家發出呼籲：從美國手中拯救美國兒童。採用美國c

description_en:
Prurigo nodularis is the itchiest condition of its kind. One patient even burnt their skin with cigarettes to stop the sensation.

But now that treatments are available, our job was to get patients back to their dermatologist.
So we made a film that captured the burden of PN – and the relief of being free of it. 

We shot a patient story on analogue film, and hand-scratched them out of every frame. All 3,900. Scalpels, fingernails and sandpaper were used to create an organic and dynamic visual e
description_zh:
結節性癢疹是同類疾病中最癢的。一名患者甚至用香菸灼燒皮膚來阻止這種感覺。

但既然有了治療方法，我們的工作就是讓病人回到皮膚科。
所以我們拍了一部電影

description_en: Case Study for the Sickle Cell Awareness Ball campaign

description_en:
The "Last Generation" is a climate activist group known for its radical and disruptive protests. Unlike more traditional environmental organizations, the Last Generation employs civil disobedience tactics, such as blocking roads and disrupting public events.

However, the impact of their aggressive activism had begun to wane. That's why, together with the agency Demner, Merlicek & Bergmann, the activists launched the world’s first climate protest on Google Maps.

Launched at the beginnin
description_zh: 「最後一代」是一個氣候活動團體，以其激進和破壞性的抗議活動而聞名。與更傳統的環保組織不同，「最後一代」採用公民不服從策略，例如封鎖道路和擾亂公共秩序

description_en: Signs From Heaven is an innovative early warning system that uses Pangu Cloud’s AI-powered forecasting to deliver life-saving weather alerts to remote communities in Madagascar. The project tackles a dire problem—thousands of fishermen and villagers lose their lives annually due to unpredictable typhoons and the lack of accessible weather forecasting. Pangu Cloud's AI processes vast amounts of meteorological data, predicting storms up to 10 days in advance with 98% accuracy.
description_zh: Signs From Heaven 是一個創新的預警系統，利用盤古雲的人工智慧預測功能，​​為馬達加斯加的偏遠社區提供挽救生命的天氣警報。該計畫解決了一個嚴峻的問題——數千名漁民和村民

description_en:
In 2024, Supercell launched their first global game in over five years and to celebrate this moment - the gaming brand released an action packed launch trailer. 

The fun packed five minute film features, global stars; Chris Hemsworth, Christina Ricci, Ken Jeong, Will Arnett and Auli’i Cravalho, all of which take on the personalities of iconic Supercell game characters that feature in the mobile game giant’s latest smash hit - Squad Busters.
description_zh:
2024 年，Supercell 推出了五年多來的首款全球遊戲，為了慶祝這一時刻，該遊戲品牌發布了一段動感十足的發布預告片。

充滿樂趣的五分鐘電影長片，全球明星；克里斯漢斯沃、克里斯蒂娜里克

description_en: Mandaue Foam Home Store has been trusted for their high-quality mattresses.  Now with more than 50 showrooms all over the Philippines, they wanted to tell people that they offer thousands of home products--to steal business from IKEA.
description_zh: Mandaue Foam Home Store 因其高品質床墊而備受信賴。現在，他們在菲律賓各地擁有 50 多個陳列室，他們想告訴人們他們提供數千種家居產品，以搶奪宜家的業務。

description_en:
The Ford SupportBelt is the first seat belt accessory designed by a U.S. automaker to help mastectomy patients travel comfortably on their road to recovery. 

Our SupportBelt product was developed with input from patients, doctors, engineers and the Ford Human Centered Design team to overcome a common challenge. 

Ergonomically engineered and non-carcinogenic, it addresses key pain points related to incisions, scars, swelling, chemo ports, and other discomforts associated with mastectomy sur
description_zh:
福特 SupportBelt 是美國汽車製造商設計的首款安全帶配件，旨在幫助乳房切除術患者在康復之路上舒適出行。

我們的 SupportBelt 產品是根據患者、醫生、工程師和技術人員的意見開發的

description_en: ︎︎︎ Axe Sweeter than the sweetest We got the chance to show our sweet side, but things got a bit out of hand… Global campaign for the...

campaign_name: The Cause Of The Accident That Started The Fire
description_en: The film was commissioned by ICEX for the conception and production of a promotional piece for Spanish talent. A young director enters a creative crisis whilst shooting. The car accident scene she is filming does not have a clear narrative cause and that leads her to lose confidence in herself. Is this crisis an exaggeration resulting from your vanity or a sincere confession of your anguish in the face of creative uncertainty? It only takes seven slightly neurotic, somewhat symphonic and quite p
description_zh: 該影片受 ICEX 委託，為西班牙人才構思製作宣傳影片。一位年輕導演在拍攝過程中陷入創作危機。她拍攝的車禍場景沒有明確的敘事原因，

description_en: The Cheeky Controller is a partnership that resulted in a truly entertaining gaming product – during one of the most competitive pop cultural moments of the year. It turned Deadpool & Wolverine fans into Xbox fans by combining two iconic brand assets to create a controller shaped like the anti-hero's ass. The results were no joke. The product and campaign broke the internet, helping Xbox gain traction across this massive fanbase.
description_zh: Cheeky Controller 是我們的合作夥伴關係，在一年中競爭最激烈的流行文化時刻之一，我們共同打造了一款真正具有娛樂性的遊戲產品。透過結合兩個標誌性的品牌資產，它將《死侍》和《金鋼狼》粉絲變成了 Xbox 粉絲

description_en:
The Flipper.
A phone case that flips your phone face down when it hears “cheers.”
A behavioral nudge disguised as a joke.
An over-engineered solution to an under-discussed problem: the screen.
Because sometimes, all it takes is a tiny robotic arm to bring attention back to where it belongs—each other.
description_zh:
鰭狀肢。
当听到“欢呼声”时，手机壳会将手机正面朝下翻转。
偽裝成笑話的行為推動。
针对一个未充分讨论的问题的过度设计的解决方案：屏幕。
因為有時，只需要一個微小的機械手臂

description_en:
To change the way people look at paralympic sports, Orange, a premium partner of the Paris 2024 Games, has launched a campaign to show that the greatest performances aren't always where you expect them to be, and to encourage as many people as possible to let themselves be carried away by sporting emotions whatever they may be.
With the powerful and inclusive message "When you love sport, you love sport," Orange and Publicis Conseil have created a visual experience by juxtaposing the men's T13 1
description_zh: 為了改變人們對殘奧會運動的看法，2024 年巴黎奧運會的高級合作夥伴 Orange 發起了一項活動，旨在表明最偉大的表演並不總是如您所願，並鼓勵盡可能多的人

description_en:
In 2024, McDonald’s spotted an opportunity to raise awareness of an important truth: it's okay not to feel happy all the time. So, in Mental Health Awareness Week, we removed the iconic smile from Happy Meal branding. 

This got families talking about the happiness expectations that face kids and re-injected Happy Meal back into culture. 

The campaign smashed objectives, selling >2.5bn boxes during activation week, and boosted brand love, supercharging positive sentiment to 87%!

It earned over
description_zh:
2024 年，麥當勞發現了一個機會來提高人們對一個重要事實的認識：不一直感到快樂也沒關係。因此，在心理健康意識週，我們從開心樂園餐品牌中刪除了標誌性的微笑。

這引起了家人的議論

description_en: As the fight for reproductive freedoms intensifies across the nation, All* In Action Fund has teamed up with director Gandja Monteiro on the provocative new film, THE TRIAL. Drawing on chilling parallels between 17th-century witch trials and today’s political landscape—where abortion bans are denying care and putting women’s lives in danger—the film debuts just weeks before the U.S. Presidential election. THE TRIAL focuses on a woman named Claire, surrounded by what appears to be an angry Salem-
description_zh: 隨著全國爭取生殖自由的鬥爭愈演愈烈，All* In Action Fund 與導演甘賈·蒙泰羅 (Gandja Monteiro) 合作拍攝了一部具有挑釁性的新電影《審判》(THE TRIAL)。借鑒 17 世紀女巫審判與今天的令人毛骨悚然的相似之處

description_en: TikTok University - Gerety Awards 2025 - Shortlist

description_en: Vaseline believes healthy skin is a right, not a privilege, regardless of age, ethnicity, or gender. However, inequities in healthcare still leave many underserved. The agency identified a gap: no skincare product addressed the unique skin issues transgender women face during gender reassignment therapy. Instead of another campaign, Vaseline created a product that tackles these concerns and accelerates inclusion, making a real, positive impact on their lives.
description_zh: 凡士林認為，健康的皮膚是一種權利，而不是一種特權，無論年齡、種族或性別如何。然而，醫療保健方面的不平等仍然使許多人得不到充分的服務。該機構發現了一個差距：沒有任何護膚產品能夠解決傳統的獨特皮膚問題。

description_en:
Vi (Vodafone Idea), one of India's largest telecom companies, helped reunite lost pilgrims with their loved ones at the world’s largest human gathering - The Maha Kumbh Mela.

Vi created Guardian Beads (Number Rakshak), a bracelet made with sacred beads engraved with digits from 0 to 9, strung to create a family member's mobile number. Traditionally, once worn, these sacred bracelets are never taken off. So, in case of separation, all the lost pilgrim needed to do was show the Guardian Beads to
description_zh:
印度最大的電信公司之一 Vi (Vodafone Idea) 在世界上最大的人類聚會——大壺節上幫助迷失的朝聖者與親人團聚。

Vi 創造了守護珠（編號 Rakshak），這是一款用神聖的珠子製成的手鍊

description_en:
Volaris W1NG COD3S turned airplane wings into discount machines. 83% of in-flight photos capture the airplane wing, yet no one ever noticed the registration code printed on it—until Volaris made it valuable.
Passengers simply snapped a pic, entered the code at volariswingcode.com, and unlocked instant flight discounts. The promo took off, flooding social media and even working on competitor planes.
With 179,692 codes redeemed, a 98% conversion rate, and zero ad spend, Volaris proved that sometim
description_zh:
Volaris W1NG COD3S 將飛機機翼變成了折扣機。83% 的飛行照片捕捉到了飛機機翼，但沒有人注意到上面印有註冊碼，直到 Volaris 讓它變得有價值。
乘客只需拍張照片，即可進入

description_en:
NHS Blood and Transplant have an urgent shortage of paediatric organ donors, with 233 children on the waiting list for a transplant. The Waiting to Live campaign made this invisible wait public, telling the real-life stories of children seeking a lifesaving donation. 

The campaign, which launched in November 2023, centred around an emotive stunt in waiting rooms across the country. 233 bespoke dolls, representing individual children, appeared in hospitals and GP surgeries, alongside OOH, TV, pr
description_zh: NHS 血液和移植中心急需兒科器官捐贈者，有 233 名兒童在等待移植。「等待生命」活動將這種無形的等待公開化，講述了孩子們尋求生活的真實故事

agency: Droga5 Part Of Accenture Song New
description_en:
Wake Up is a story about finding your humanity in a world that sometimes feels designed to diminish it. The film actualizes the proverbial “rat race” as a surreal metropolis inhabited by anthropomorphic rats. The rodent society we observe is one that’s unquestionably their own, yet undoubtedly familiar.

We follow Horatio, our furry protagonist, and discover a world burdened by routine. The daily grind has stripped all the rodent citizens of their spark—well, almost all of them. Horatio comes ac
description_zh: 《醒來》是一個關於在一個有時讓人感覺會削弱人性的世界中尋找人性的故事。這部電影將眾所周知的「老鼠賽跑」現實化為一個居住著擬人化老鼠的超現實大都市。我們觀察到的囓齒動物社會是這樣一個社會

description_en: A photo-real CGI walrus set sail on a speedboat as mystified fishermen watch on in this playful ad for Virgin Media playing on the idea that the ride is as speedy and smooth as Virgin Media's broadband.
description_zh: 在 Virgin Media 的這則俏皮廣告中，一頭逼真的 CGI 海像在快艇上起航，神秘的漁民在一旁觀看，廣告中的理念是航行與 Virgin Media 的寬頻一樣快速、平穩。

campaign_name: When You’Ve Done Enough, Evil’D Enough

description_en: The campaign for its latest sparkling beverage, CIAO!, sees Sanpellegrino reunite award-winning actors Michael Imperioli and Steve Schirripa on screen. Learn more about Ogilvy's Advertising capabilities at Ogilvy.
description_zh: Sanpellegrino 在其最新氣泡飲料 CIAO! 的宣傳活動中，屢獲殊榮的演員 Michael Imperioli 和 Steve Schirripa 在銀幕上再次聯手。了解更多有關奧美廣告能力的資訊。
